[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=417.2.1.da41e8618b78ed9d5d65525bb1cc6612) |
---
# DON'T MISS Monday May 22nd, 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
## The current mission
---
|
---
Monday evening the May 22nd, we are excited to show a movie for our CRA meeting. Nena and I had the privilege of being invited to the Red Carpet premiere of the Documentary Grid Down Power up. This is an Amazing film narrated by Dennis Quaid. We were able to spend time with the writers, director and the producers. We also talked with former Congressmen, defense department personnel, and special forces. It was an amazing, but alarming time. You must see this film Monday evening.
Door opens at 6:30 we get started shortly after.
Monday May 22nd, El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Give me Liberty or Give me death!
Derrick Gates
|
---
# Dennis Quaid hosts an alarming look into the potential of life without power.
A dynamic legion of energy, economic, national security, and infrastructure experts fearlessly expose our most critical global threat: the vulnerability of our nation’s power grids. Together they inform the public of imminent threats and the infinite horrors in store from prolonged power loss. Buckle down and power up with this series of shocking scenarios. Grid failure is a real and imminent threat, a devastatingly deadly occurrence leading to life-threatening shortages of heat, food, and water. If protective measures are not taken, we will experience catastrophic failures leaving citizens in states of starvation, death, destruction, and darkness for months. Reports released from Texas’ 3-day “snowmageddon” indicate a minimum death toll of 246, with some estimates climbing as high as 702. An outage of 1-2 years would lead to 10,000,000+ deaths. One thing is evident: the clock is ticking, and if nothing changes, the power may go out for good.
---
---

name: Don Huffines
subject: I need your help (with GREAT news)
body:
We have our best chance in 70 years to eliminate vehicle inspections!
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Let's eliminate vehicle safety inspections in Texas.**
## Stop the parasitic money grabbers and support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience liberty with our vehicles.
GREAT NEWS, PATRIOTS! We are winning.While in the Texas Senate I spent four years trying to eliminate the vehicle inspection tax, and I almost killed it in 2017. We have our best chance in 70 years to eradicate this unnecessary big government program, the vehicle safety inspection.Please join me in supporting HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience liberty with our vehicles. This legislation passed the House and is being voted on by the Senate on Monday. This out-of-date program is just one more tax Texans are forced to pay. Enough is enough.I am quite familiar with the car business, and trust me when I tell you: vehicle inspections are a scam. You are being ripped off. Texas is the only Republican state to have this policy. This inspection is not about safety but about stealing your time and money. We will be the 36th state to return liberty to vehicle ownership.Look at the groups working to keep this worthless and out-of-date program: Gulf States Toyota (billionaires), Alliance for Automotive Innovation, and all of the state inspection shops making money on Texas car owners (with the government!).Please join me in thanking bill sponsor Sen. Mays Middleton (512 463-0111). Please[ call your State Senator](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-y/) and urge them to vote for HB 3297.Thank you for the help!
Don HuffinesPS: Below are some resources on this issue.Huffines Liberty Foundation research paper on vehicle inspections: [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-j/) [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-t/) My op-ed on vehicle inspections: [Read Op-ed](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-h/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-k/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-b/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-n/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zsvdy-l-v)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-p/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-zsvdy-17329976-yuddtktydi-e) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-zsvdy-yuddtktydi-s/)

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we’ve produced our newest online course, “Ancient Christianity,” which we’ll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQwLTM1NWRkZjk1MTIyYzQ2OWFhYTViOTg2Yzg2MDQzOWFhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/bzH0jDbJCdGyJNlGvLuAOA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: Investigate Biden
body:
He’s weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him.

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden may be coming after you next... He’s weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him. [**That’s****why I’m asking you to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN’S ABUSES OF POWER Petition right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zahem9htnuctp7d9ib2scn8tlosaq1jsgh4t7a68_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) Just look at what’s happened in the past few months:
---
* Biden’s FBI used the Counterterrorism Division to conduct investigations into innocent parents protesting at school board meetings.
* Biden’s IRS is continuing to target and attack conservatives while allowing liberal groups like BLM to break the law.
* Biden’s Attorney General “personally approved” the unprecedented raid on President Trump’s home. And now he’s been indicted and arrested on bogus charges in New York City.
* Biden’s full-armed SWAT units are being used to arrest peaceful pro-life supporters.

---
These kinds of abuses of power are usually only seen in third-world dictatorships... But this is an organized effort across the government to intimidate Biden’s political opponents and silence anyone who disagrees with them. And we have to stop it. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN’S ABUSES OF POWER Petition.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zps85mvs9dqvlvrqphnqkjirt7ifhju168ndl01g_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) Biden has declared war on America’s conservatives. He’s taken neutral law enforcement organizations and turned them into weapons of partisan politics. Only in Biden’s America can people who burn down police stations, attack courthouses and destroy statues walk free... ... While elderly pro-life activists are surrounded and arrested by dozens of fully-armed FBI agents. It’s insanity. I never thought I’d see something like that here in America... But this is where we are. Biden is weaponizing the government and if we don’t fight back NOW, it’s only going to get worse – [**so****please follow this link to sign the Petition right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5hhsvivumcqu60aacm388s16beur76e70tqq0r0_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) My friend, the Left will not stop. If they can’t win debating the message – they destroy the messenger. So, they attack. And attack. And attack. We must force Biden to answer for his crimes -- and a House Select Committee investigation is the best way for his abuses to see the light of day and hold him accountable. [**So****please sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN’S ABUSES OF POWER Petition right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoag40vo61q64dg5ipcgamj95qb8rniec5lfqutg_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) There isn’t a better group than the Freedom Center to lead this fight. You see, I was a leader in the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s. I know their playbook – because I helped write it. Now I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – we fight fire with fire – and we win. And because of our success, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless attacks from the Left:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly decided not to renew our contract.

---
No other group has faced these kinds of attacks because the radical Left fears us and our work. You see, we NEVER back down and we hit them where it hurts... but to stop Biden’s abuses of power I need your help. That’s why I’m asking you to do two things for me. [**The****first is to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN’S ABUSES OF POWER Petition.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze46170t7fn8ai6n7abcnh8ha9f3am5n9usjjrjg_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) Your name will be sent along with one million others and sent to Republican Caucus leader Kevin McCarthy demanding he creates a Select Committee to Investigate Biden’s abuses of power. [**The****second favor I’m asking of you today is to make an urgent one-time donation of $23 with your signed Petition.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhm3a4s3d12iuu2k5ji4ls4vbruirdj4j2q359mo_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) Your $23 one-time donation will be used to send an additional 44 **SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN’S ABUSES OF POWER** Petitions to like-minded patriots across the country. The only way we’re going to stop Joe Biden is with an overwhelming campaign across America. That’s why your $23 donation is so critical. We must bring more people to our cause and get them to join our fight. And I’m sorry, but we cannot wait or delay -- we must act now. [**That’s****why if you’re blessed enough to make a larger donation of $35, $50, $100 or more I would be eternally grateful.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvcdfq9eejhcnr28vi4m82ms925rn2d89doim0k8_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) Just know that your one-time donation of $23, $50, $100 or more will be put to immediate use stopping Joe Biden’s abuses of power, because nothing is more important... If they can go after a former President and a peaceful pro-life father who have done nothing wrong – you could be next, so please rush back your signed Petition right away.
---
| | For America,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
| | P.S. Joe Biden has weaponized our government and is using it as a tool to attack and destroy his political enemies. With your support today we can use Congress to make him pay for his constant abuses of power. [**So please sign the SELECT****COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN’S ABUSES OF POWER Petition right away.** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm6en8hahn0uhlffo2l8c5oj79504o1smf77jnu8_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs) After signing the Petition**,[please make your very best one-time gift of $23 to the Freedom Center to help fund this absolutely critical campaign](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdi60qa5ch7qikos45ckov29v32ngj3suf1pcr4o_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs)**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb65ltha2ptv0s98rdtcmlg2ul646774n3orrbdo_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge4oj4cdh2bs)to hold Biden accountable for his blatant abuses of power.

clean_body: He’s weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him. | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden may be coming after you next... He’s weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him. Just look at what’s happened in the past few months: Biden’s FBI used the Counterterrorism Division to conduct investigations into innocent parents protesting at school board meetings. Biden’s IRS is continuing to target and attack conservatives while allowing liberal groups like BLM to break the law. Biden’s Attorney General “personally approved” the unprecedented raid on President Trump’s home. And now he’s been indicted and arrested on bogus charges in New York City. Biden’s full-armed SWAT units are being used to arrest peaceful pro-life supporters. These kinds of abuses of power are usually only seen in third-world dictatorships... But this is an organized effort across the government to intimidate Biden’s political opponents and silence anyone who disagrees with them. And we have to stop it. Biden has declared war on America’s conservatives. He’s taken neutral law enforcement organizations and turned them into weapons of partisan politics. Only in Biden’s America can people who burn down police stations, attack courthouses and destroy statues walk free... ... While elderly pro-life activists are surrounded and arrested by dozens of fully-armed FBI agents. It’s insanity. I never thought I’d see something like that here in America... But this is where we are. Biden is weaponizing the government and if we don’t fight back NOW, it’s only going to get worse – My friend, the Left will not stop. If they can’t win debating the message – they destroy the messenger. So, they attack. And attack. And attack. We must force Biden to answer for his crimes -- and a House Select Committee investigation is the best way for his abuses to see the light of day and hold him accountable. There isn’t a better group than the Freedom Center to lead this fight. You see, I was a leader in the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s. I know their playbook – because I helped write it. Now I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – we fight fire with fire – and we win. And because of our success, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless attacks from the Left: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly decided not to renew our contract. No other group has faced these kinds of attacks because the radical Left fears us and our work. You see, we NEVER back down and we hit them where it hurts... but to stop Biden’s abuses of power I need your help. That’s why I’m asking you to do two things for me. Your name will be sent along with one million others and sent to Republican Caucus leader Kevin McCarthy demanding he creates a Select Committee to Investigate Biden’s abuses of power. Your $23 one-time donation will be used to send an additional 44 SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN’S ABUSES OF POWER Petitions to like-minded patriots across the country. The only way we’re going to stop Joe Biden is with an overwhelming campaign across America. That’s why your $23 donation is so critical. We must bring more people to our cause and get them to join our fight. And I’m sorry, but we cannot wait or delay -- we must act now. Just know that your one-time donation of $23, $50, $100 or more will be put to immediate use stopping Joe Biden’s abuses of power, because nothing is more important... If they can go after a former President and a peaceful pro-life father who have done nothing wrong – you could be next, so please rush back your signed Petition right away. | | For America, David Horowitz | | P.S. Joe Biden has weaponized our government and is using it as a tool to attack and destroy his political enemies. With your support today we can use Congress to make him pay for his constant abuses of power. After signing the Petition, hold Biden accountable for his blatant abuses of power. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. I am declaring a FUNDRAISING EMERGENCY. Members of the U.S. Government are effectively accusing me of being a felon and destroying the lives of patriots. My goal is to raise $100,000 to immediately double down on the Kash Foundation's efforts to support whistleblowers and continue exposing the Deep State. Please use one of these links to donate ANY Amount: You and I cannot let these government gangsters destroy more lives and silence our voices. I am proud of The Kash Foundation and all of the America-First supporters who have stepped up to donate and support whistleblowers and others in need- victims of government overreach. I consider these FBI whistleblowers to be superheroes. Please help me FIGHT big government bullies that destroy our system of justice. Thank you for everything, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Action News
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zscttf1o3pf7obj0t58m01mlaqhb660e366g6nd8_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge2o36c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z117hugv6pcc0nto9fmpl29ng135elgfekkc7v18_rp22sh2s8i66o71clge2o36c3h2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Public schools vs. Christians
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vscfhI3D_N

I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth
graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social
climate that is stacked...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscfhI3D_N

Friend

I gave my
life to Christ when I was in fifth grade.

But fifth
graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social
climate that is stacked against Christians.

Public
schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling
kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum
based on critical race theory.

As
Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and
bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped
by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our
beliefs.

America
needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives
to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into
our schools, communities, and culture.

That's
exactly why TPUSA Faith launched Kingdom to the Capitol - a
series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY state capitals to
ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country.

As a
fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom
to the Capitol when we're in your state capital.

But
whether or not you're able to attend, I hope you'll support TPUSA
Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable
us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship
events.

Support
Kingdom to the Capitol

Our
educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping
us to see things as they truly are… revealing what's
right, good, true, and beautiful.

TPUSA
Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our
nation's children and public education to go to school boards,
classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do
what is right.

Right
now, we have Kingdom to the Capitol events scheduled in Texas,
Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events
in additional state capitals.

These
important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible
by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the
hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America.

Will you
please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this
mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation's
children, and the future of our nation?

I believe
this is a season for revival for our nation.

These are
desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public
education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion,
you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our
country when it drifts from the truth of scripture.

With the
generous partnership of followers of Jesus - like you - TPUSA
Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide,
fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of
believers back into their communities.

I pray
that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the
hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation.

As
Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon,
which is why it's critical that we come together in powerful
worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can't do that
without you. Will you please make a much-needed gift right now?

Our
educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches
our children how to discern God's will, how to live in society,
and how to be wise.

But you
and I both know that our current public education system has
strayed as far as possible from this purpose.

TPUSA
Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to
change the trajectory of public education - and our nation - for
the future of our children.

Kingdom
to the Capitol is our most ambitious and historic revival tour
yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope
of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities
across our nation.

Whether
the Lord leads you to give $35, $50, $100, or some other amount,
I hope you can support our FIFTY worship events during a
desperate - and dark - time for America. In order to reach EVERY
state capital, and save our nation, it's critical that we have
your support today.

Support
Kingdom to the Capitol

Together,
Friend, we can spark REVIVAL in our beloved nation.

God bless
you,

Charlie
Kirk
TPUSA
Faith

Support
TPUSA Faith

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: UTTERLY HUMILIATED
subject: It's hard to express how we feel at this moment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILLPAC
body:
Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

| |
---
| | | It's hard to express how utterly humiliated we feel at this moment.

Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

_**In response, Republicans started our own petition to protect these laws and ensure every election in the country is safe and secure.**_

But the number of responses we got was embarrassing... and the defeat we may face in the next election because of it will be even more heartbreaking.

But we've got another chance, Friend. This fight is too crucial and our election integrity is too important to quit. **[So we're asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5310b5d264dc4b62a7ab58964d8fd30f&_e=fEw83qtuqBycJwQUkE6cwPVPZNNvWpw1HYB4KGQahigRH-UAjtkaXiqg3bVn5gOSdMPQ1WagCB_Ox44JZg_kboTkTy85fMtmVZMj7T8ZZG5mykNckAEQfu_7j4FN7OlpA-ttkWUUjoEs7oOdy_91HcPwKbG7A1oHN9sT7NvTe-q9zk6Ao06PsWnJV8c_hZDTQ1TUQDfzB92PuOdI6q3gmuC12Xw4NfvCqLilKE7BXMTRCLrh2vQBUC7p2qDGzNC72TLc3mDpiIpu8RpWS1xYR1YKTlcqYKDFq3ar4eBQnq1xnXiTDBSj-1hQ_Pl-2FsHMmtvVwbbY4xt-gqRYuDJK9CZMxYS6LLDVyuccTA-jH8ZyBhd8u3Av2XSsZvK5ZHDd5JDoJkD93vprSwQaFfNG7Gaia_t5AMPovIMnN4vPfjAJOadDl-e1O9anJRtcOARbXXjD4zMSaBhb1nTHntgbSCY5ZmbhUeT8DKMYs9tAzE%3D "So we’re asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?")**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41c271e0d7b540ad8e7285e6508664ae&_e=bIBCdrCnuNJT3x8xJJbXK_s8AMmfkurTtfxREUa-7K5xxKyw7Gd0W3yhUyVggo7oXPTG67Xfe1oV_Bl0-8ubJzFVE-ms6BPMtp8lTtcR9v551KPpAPaOygCLSp92flmBMXGnILrOa20sPFATZZV7c9xyfFw0hcAqCMKF89VGLw2oiOsqKt9ZkjxOiz7kL3q-_NOHwtmFbq3AzRsq-tzXTls6SNAJWSZbrxpwFGC0U2YR7HbEDOltth_dANRgLEh-78ecW6zJxGUBnRBKlocvsBWzZwUlYmlG6fu5LBbDe5d-Q_c9-ReVDXSiUE5TwEwOLF2O9DIFuVNaw6aAjFyE4hue2-7JvRoHWhEVG0D2gppDXDS2Gr-Jaqs9nsSQ5Uq4_TKQzDcMhewDFUwDiGFpzuQEU73XBf-n9fKoge0yKRA%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41c271e0d7b540ad8e7285e6508664ae&_e=bIBCdrCnuNJT3x8xJJbXK_s8AMmfkurTtfxREUa-7K5xxKyw7Gd0W3yhUyVggo7oXPTG67Xfe1oV_Bl0-8ubJzFVE-ms6BPMtp8lTtcR9v551KPpAPaOygCLSp92flmBMXGnILrOa20sPFATZZV7c9xyfFw0hcAqCMKF89VGLw2oiOsqKt9ZkjxOiz7kL3q-_NOHwtmFbq3AzRsq-tzXTls6SNAJWSZbrxpwFGC0U2YR7HbEDOltth_dANRgLEh-giCufUZJSi_Pz1VYx8bGcxS9keRFJ9E36TX7V23ADXicTSuT0Ts_RkCXzxSVlYAXQcIwnfuS1g6YDadMMOGqILrPcaIxtW4uM5HMCZfW_NXgdh-WWXAnZKcYgI2aogTK3VIPPMvwMUFtqPveqTDo_Z7GMsa9P5aAlpd1n_LYL7k%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41c271e0d7b540ad8e7285e6508664ae&_e=bIBCdrCnuNJT3x8xJJbXK_s8AMmfkurTtfxREUa-7K5xxKyw7Gd0W3yhUyVggo7oXPTG67Xfe1oV_Bl0-8ubJzFVE-ms6BPMtp8lTtcR9v551KPpAPaOygCLSp92flmBMXGnILrOa20sPFATZZV7c9xyfFw0hcAqCMKF89VGLw2oiOsqKt9ZkjxOiz7kL3q-_NOHwtmFbq3AzRsq-tzXTls6SNAJWSZbrxpwFGC0U2YR7HbEDOltth_dANRgLEh-BIRsKVbP4X3bfAcV5dLNlLGMfp1mzqV44zvl55fhPBXy0upXcGj5gCdKyF89qrDnmhpQ22hI1O3jeNnwnvnKijABwxC2D_NScB4Jw2J6BPWwGrH8M2Kgf8mdySfQMoWvi0qNDGL3xrFuWT7HE31c7nV65UdndnT9AmA_HwSYdgE%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| Friends and Neighbors,
My team and I are fighting to protect Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. My opponents ran a spirited race. Now, fellow Republicans must "lock arms" so we can defeat my Democrat opponent and at the same time help fellow Republicans win across Virginia in November.
Please visit our website [www.mcguireforvirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_9QIOaMYU9w_YOa94bNtp4qU0NCuj5qrZcGMd3usUE_6mpCCcmbCUROxJxqmn4WAqECU09SP4frljRfAzrNUoT0sJbD5DOPepTjtazhnfeNv-bfsEl9RdDigtL7EVrPvaeHZvMivYdJ_LzxYfK9Gn765i2rJY95&c=1HRx-SEc8h2jr6KIvzjMruxksiNbsXoNnW_OKY4DDBRfADw9SztF9w==&ch=2UsawdU91lyrZS2duM2S-7RZMusRP2JQFuvyHByjvjuYvOBUzTnxaA==) to learn more, donate, get a sign, and/ or volunteer. Photos with elected officials and/ or other candidates do not mean an endorsement unless otherwise stated.
Today is the House of Delegates District 56 convention in Cumberland County. We are sending prayers to Kevin Bailey, Tom Garrett, and Jennie Wood.
Here is my latest update:
---
| Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorses Delegate Buddy Fowler
---
|
---
| I am super excited Governor Glenn Youngkin joined me in endorsing my friend and fellow conservative Republican Delegate Buddy Fowler for re-election. Delegate Fowler's District 59 includes Louisa, Hanover, and Henrico.
Please ask friends and family to join us in supporting/ re-electing Delegate Buddy Fowler in his primary on June 20th. Vote early now through June 17. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_9QIOaMYU9w_YOa94bNtp4qU0NCuj5qrZcGMd3usUE_6mpCCcmbCaiGTt_kDMsXMEPtduo0EA2jtVPTRAObO0tKFwy2YSp728wEEyjc495mQzwyQm4e_UXUh6bxem2sX8MAfDJie7yLrRRZNgR3n90Nkftc_UmU2ODWml2dybKMMeQJJFBZ5ANQKAoM3IUxrP5Ofl3WtWtHRg52BzeBB1tG11USKunLdfos1AZt2RS12Qvdbi3QJ6dyXubiEayV9nBwa7hCP7g=&c=1HRx-SEc8h2jr6KIvzjMruxksiNbsXoNnW_OKY4DDBRfADw9SztF9w==&ch=2UsawdU91lyrZS2duM2S-7RZMusRP2JQFuvyHByjvjuYvOBUzTnxaA==)

| CNN Presidential Town Hall Link
---
|
---
| I got a chance to watch the CNN Presidential Town Hall with President Donald Trump. It is amazing to me the lengths the left continues to go to mislead the American people. As the truth continues to come out, we see Trump was right about many things. [Click here to watch the Commercial Free Full Show here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_9QIOaMYU9w_YOa94bNtp4qU0NCuj5qrZcGMd3usUE_6mpCCcmbCaiGTt_kDMsXoS6vZ2YDpYvfWY6wWvARB9NPrLAKk3bX8latdNpDavvuO-Bks_Saz3DctR-IgNdzlk2VwZ5-7_hkZGnQ31d5IUy6pf8Sgk_eTS36ER8hAvdjSER_xW-8qQ==&c=1HRx-SEc8h2jr6KIvzjMruxksiNbsXoNnW_OKY4DDBRfADw9SztF9w==&ch=2UsawdU91lyrZS2duM2S-7RZMusRP2JQFuvyHByjvjuYvOBUzTnxaA==)

| Amelia Day
---
|
---
| "No man in the wrong can stand up against a fellow that's in the right and keeps on a-comin'." -Bill McDonald Texas Ranger.

|

|

| Delegate Lee Ware and I attended Amelia Day to celebrate 288 years of Amelia County. I'm looking forward to being on the ballot with Lee Ware in November. Thanks to you, we won eight out of ten counties including Amelia County at the SD 10 Convention. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_9QIOaMYU9w_YOa94bNtp4qU0NCuj5qrZcGMd3usUE_6mpCCcmbCUROxJxqmn4WiUTDo7tHvBTpSDxD5LJw-UsiPzfE6R4F1K-6WNPfnzisYlfsLWNNS0UQgXWIXRBkK6fIBveKEFWKb14yarfzcWN1T1ZCxSEX4Ag5rmLqZsSVVgyQN3z1JfkUOoAWzebLaPlXJU5fHX9I6YFJVYkXkSjPLVCqVWwwmzroRGcCuBFXfs3QpcIgps2pi60U6QY8RtNznaFAXnDbIixhh5Hq5m33t4saiBFEKHdT1muMpVr0tciMofD_SAwD00eWaiZnFDyGXpS4OiJrqKz_eUdnP4zGiNKuiAC1w-8NnC9OsXWHQYd36_VppPIQ6-EvBD6twz_g-ffPL3L2uRINyurYDwYEA2Xiqr0IfphDOW3dlSI=&c=1HRx-SEc8h2jr6KIvzjMruxksiNbsXoNnW_OKY4DDBRfADw9SztF9w==&ch=2UsawdU91lyrZS2duM2S-7RZMusRP2JQFuvyHByjvjuYvOBUzTnxaA==) for details.

| Re-elect Senator Amanda Chase
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_9QIOaMYU9w_YOa94bNtp4qU0NCuj5qrZcGMd3usUE_6mpCCcmbCUROxJxqmn4W6AWTH89sRKGbqfxvO2RIm92Dmo7viOjqvnNBPRyMUh-AsB6kHhvLwmuS7MMydvg8jtQiod8RVODkNPa97iTvtg==&c=1HRx-SEc8h2jr6KIvzjMruxksiNbsXoNnW_OKY4DDBRfADw9SztF9w==&ch=2UsawdU91lyrZS2duM2S-7RZMusRP2JQFuvyHByjvjuYvOBUzTnxaA==)
---
| I am proud to endorse my Republican friend and fellow Christian conservative, Senator Amanda Chase, for re-election to the Virginia State Senate. Senator Amanda Chase has a solid conservative voting record, so you will not have to guess how she will vote.
Please ask friends and family to join me in supporting/ re-electing [Senator Amanda Chase](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_9QIOaMYU9w_YOa94bNtp4qU0NCuj5qrZcGMd3usUE_6mpCCcmbCUROxJxqmn4W6AWTH89sRKGbqfxvO2RIm92Dmo7viOjqvnNBPRyMUh-AsB6kHhvLwmuS7MMydvg8jtQiod8RVODkNPa97iTvtg==&c=1HRx-SEc8h2jr6KIvzjMruxksiNbsXoNnW_OKY4DDBRfADw9SztF9w==&ch=2UsawdU91lyrZS2duM2S-7RZMusRP2JQFuvyHByjvjuYvOBUzTnxaA==) in his primary on June 20th. Vote early now through June 17.
---
| Hanover Sheriff's Office Annual Memorial Breakfast
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Many of us honored and remembered our law enforcement fallen in Hanover County. We would not have a country without our men and women in law enforcement. Thank you for your service and your sacrifice.
---
| Powhatan Breakfast with Republican Delegate Lee Ware
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Delegate Lee Ware has been a friend and a mentor to not just me, but many in the General Assembly. I've really enjoyed our discussions on policy and statesmanship. It is no surprise he had a huge turnout at his annual breakfast in Powhatan County. Majority Leader Terry Kilgore was the featured speaker. Terry reminded us about Lee's "SAT words" on the floor and his many contributions to Virginia. I'm looking forward to sharing the ballot with Delegate Lee Ware as your State Senate republican nominee District 10 for Powhatan and Amelia in November.
---
| STAND Awards Dinner
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

|
---
|
---
|

|

|

|

|

|

| Many members of my political team and I attended the annual S.T.A.N.D. Awards Dinner to celebrate 14 years of fighting to save America in Tyson Corner. Virginia. S.T.A.N.D. - Staying True to America's National Destiny, a national nonprofit organization with a mission to bring Americans together across racial and cultural lines to preserve our Judeo- Christian values and heritage. There were many speakers, including E.W. Jackson, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, former Congresswoman Michele Bachmann, former Congressman Allen West, and others. [Learn more here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_9QIOaMYU9w_YOa94bNtp4qU0NCuj5qrZcGMd3usUE_6mpCCcmbCaiGTt_kDMsXZoRM314EqclxoXdm2dfQ1eMaW5BwekwDGmKshF9YVLJXvN3i_e1osX1XN61FfwqYIO6ArD9duevy9MMBa268WA==&c=1HRx-SEc8h2jr6KIvzjMruxksiNbsXoNnW_OKY4DDBRfADw9SztF9w==&ch=2UsawdU91lyrZS2duM2S-7RZMusRP2JQFuvyHByjvjuYvOBUzTnxaA==).
---
| Thank You!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I am meeting some wonderful people on my thank you tour around Senate District 10. Please visit my website www.mcguireforvirginia.com and get involved. We can win in November and help Governor Glenn Youngkin and the rest of the General Assembly un-California Virginia.
---
| Buckingham High School
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| This week, I visited Buckingham County High School and spoke with students and teachers on service and sacrifice. Special thanks to fellow veteran and ROTC and track coach, Sergeant Bruce Grazier, for your emphasis on being strong, working as a team, and love of country.
---
| Goochland GOP Meeting
---
|
---
|
---
| I attended the Goochland GOP meeting this week and thanked Goochland for their overwhelming support for our team at the convention. Goochland vote totals: McGuire 168 Adams 37 Dyer 6 Brindley 3 We also heard from other candidates; House of Delegates District 57 David Owens, Angela Allen for re-election to school board, Jonathan Lyle for supervisor, and others.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Friends and Neighbors, My team and I are fighting to protect Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. My opponents ran a spirited race. Now, fellow Republicans must "lock arms" so we can defeat my Democrat opponent and at the same time help fellow Republicans win across Virginia in November. Please visit our website == to learn more, donate, get a sign, and/ or volunteer. Photos with elected officials and/ or other candidates do not mean an endorsement unless otherwise stated. Today is the House of Delegates District 56 convention in Cumberland County. We are sending prayers to Kevin Bailey, Tom Garrett, and Jennie Wood. Here is my latest update: | Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorses Delegate Buddy Fowler | | I am super excited Governor Glenn Youngkin joined me in endorsing my friend and fellow conservative Republican Delegate Buddy Fowler for re-election. Delegate Fowler's District 59 includes Louisa, Hanover, and Henrico. Please ask friends and family to join us in supporting/ re-electing Delegate Buddy Fowler in his primary on June 20th. Vote early now through June 17. == | CNN Presidential Town Hall Link | | I got a chance to watch the CNN Presidential Town Hall with President Donald Trump. It is amazing to me the lengths the left continues to go to mislead the American people. As the truth continues to come out, we see Trump was right about many things. == | Amelia Day | | "No man in the wrong can stand up against a fellow that's in the right and keeps on a-comin'." -Bill McDonald Texas Ranger. | | | | | | | | | | | | Delegate Lee Ware and I attended Amelia Day to celebrate 288 years of Amelia County. I'm looking forward to being on the ballot with Lee Ware in November. Thanks to you, we won eight out of ten counties including Amelia County at the SD 10 Convention. == for details. | Re-elect Senator Amanda Chase | == | I am proud to endorse my Republican friend and fellow Christian conservative, Senator Amanda Chase, for re-election to the Virginia State Senate. Senator Amanda Chase has a solid conservative voting record, so you will not have to guess how she will vote. Please ask friends and family to join me in supporting/ re-electing == in his primary on June 20th. Vote early now through June 17. | Hanover Sheriff's Office Annual Memorial Breakfast | | | | | | Many of us honored and remembered our law enforcement fallen in Hanover County. We would not have a country without our men and women in law enforcement. Thank you for your service and your sacrifice. | Powhatan Breakfast with Republican Delegate Lee Ware | | | | | | | | Delegate Lee Ware has been a friend and a mentor to not just me, but many in the General Assembly. I've really enjoyed our discussions on policy and statesmanship. It is no surprise he had a huge turnout at his annual breakfast in Powhatan County. Majority Leader Terry Kilgore was the featured speaker. Terry reminded us about Lee's "SAT words" on the floor and his many contributions to Virginia. I'm looking forward to sharing the ballot with Delegate Lee Ware as your State Senate republican nominee District 10 for Powhatan and Amelia in November. | STAND Awards Dinner | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Many members of my political team and I attended the annual S.T.A.N.D. Awards Dinner to celebrate 14 years of fighting to save America in Tyson Corner. Virginia. S.T.A.N.D. - Staying True to America's National Destiny, a national nonprofit organization with a mission to bring Americans together across racial and cultural lines to preserve our Judeo- Christian values and heritage. There were many speakers, including E.W. Jackson, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, former Congresswoman Michele Bachmann, former Congressman Allen West, and others. ==. | Thank You! | | | | | I am meeting some wonderful people on my thank you tour around Senate District 10. Please visit my website www.mcguireforvirginia.com and get involved. We can win in November and help Governor Glenn Youngkin and the rest of the General Assembly un-California Virginia. | Buckingham High School | | | | This week, I visited Buckingham County High School and spoke with students and teachers on service and sacrifice. Special thanks to fellow veteran and ROTC and track coach, Sergeant Bruce Grazier, for your emphasis on being strong, working as a team, and love of country. | Goochland GOP Meeting | | | I attended the Goochland GOP meeting this week and thanked Goochland for their overwhelming support for our team at the convention. Goochland vote totals: McGuire 168 Adams 37 Dyer 6 Brindley 3 We also heard from other candidates; House of Delegates District 57 David Owens, Angela Allen for re-election to school board, Jonathan Lyle for supervisor, and others. | Rally Virginia Law Enforcement Memorial | | | | | | | | We honored and remembered our fallen law enforcement officers in Richmond, Virginia. Speakers included Secretary of Public Safety Bob Mosure, Governor Glenn Youngkin, Attorney General Jason Miyares, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, and others. Thank you for your service and your sacrifice. | More Convention Photos | | Virginia Republican Party of Virginia (RPV) Chairman, fellow veteran, and former Delegate Rich Anderson. | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for sharing your convention photos and stories with us. | Mother's Day | | My Aunt Mary, here with my uncle Rocky, has been like a mother to me and could use your prayers. She is always caring, upbeat, positive, and full of love! | | We took Tracy's step-mother out to lunch at the Tobacco Company for Mother's Day. Thank moms for all you do! | Song of the Day Born Free Kid Rock | == | Freedom is precious and must be defended. For a little inspiration, == to listen to Kid Rock's song Born Free! | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We need to keep laying out big, bold plans that lift up working families and protect our values. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63559969/407244806/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13X_EGR_E_20230520_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2JhNGE4OS0xZmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9KYtILDw0q7Xn2BDYDjRleBAzebwdaMvRy2KOgtqnQ=&emci=afba4a89-1ff7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b3ba4a89-1ff7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I’m running for re-election because although we’ve made tremendous progress as a movement (like getting student debt cancellation signed by the president, and cracking down on giant corporations that weren't paying federal income taxes), there’s still so much more to do. **Here are some of the plans that I’m fighting for:**
* Pass a wealth tax to make the wealthy finally pay their fair share.
* End the filibuster to ensure abortion rights and enact gun safety laws across the country.
* Significantly reduce the cost of child care for every American family, making it as low as $10 a day.
* Rein in big banks and pass stronger regulations to prevent another economic crisis.
* Make the Supreme Court follow a basic code of ethics.
* Expand Social Security benefits by $2,400 a year and fully fund the program all the way to 2096.
* Fast and free federal tax filing, so Americans don’t have to go through profiteering middlemen like TurboTax. (This is on its way!)
* Crack down on corporate profiteering and price gouging so that working families don’t pay the price for their greed.
* Ban members of Congress and their spouses from owning and trading individual stocks.

We need to keep laying out big, bold plans that lift up working families and protect our values, and here’s the absolutely critical part: We need leaders who are willing to fight for them. [_**I’m going to keep fighting with everything I’ve got — but nobody gets this done on their own. If you believe that these are the types of fights elected leaders should be taking on, please pitch in $15 or anything you can today to power my re-election campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63559970/407244813/618430748?amount=15&refcode=EMZ13X_EGR_E_20230520_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2JhNGE4OS0xZmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9KYtILDw0q7Xn2BDYDjRleBAzebwdaMvRy2KOgtqnQ=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: We need to keep laying out big, bold plans that lift up working families and protect our values. | | | I’m running for re-election because although we’ve made tremendous progress as a movement (like getting student debt cancellation signed by the president, and cracking down on giant corporations that weren't paying federal income taxes), there’s still so much more to do. Here are some of the plans that I’m fighting for: Pass a wealth tax to make the wealthy finally pay their fair share. End the filibuster to ensure abortion rights and enact gun safety laws across the country. Significantly reduce the cost of child care for every American family, making it as low as $10 a day. Rein in big banks and pass stronger regulations to prevent another economic crisis. Make the Supreme Court follow a basic code of ethics. Expand Social Security benefits by $2,400 a year and fully fund the program all the way to 2096. Fast and free federal tax filing, so Americans don’t have to go through profiteering middlemen like TurboTax. (This is on its way!) Crack down on corporate profiteering and price gouging so that working families don’t pay the price for their greed. * Ban members of Congress and their spouses from owning and trading individual stocks. We need to keep laying out big, bold plans that lift up working families and protect our values, and here’s the absolutely critical part: We need leaders who are willing to fight for them. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff...

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25a0db87040e483bab0f157f9eb43c9f&_e=biaMR6XGiYJW1w5zHjm-GcaxBedQTMrOPwOneb5BtxKD6QL3t9iO_iOtbr21eL-FoEFtexcHPVkrPKcBcTmvfpSMgF-Ij2x3b9qW7gChEmQtHA5dKi-feMy7rwFpZsvsUj3BqGb9TJY_sEE7dAenQMal_mBSDM9-LzZK5gXosbU7rSo7p0COhQYlYTsVm_mzMrsi-jShgS7anhOIDH-fZtGLO7K109TcdDA7KzEjPCtbjpMwrbKdjKjVyCW691neoXywfPrgygVcj8XSJPKhXJlbW_vjd4wPfSn4vW9AR7emjGD_lTJk9bxN3nExzxC_faGpPB-Kb8_sZnjiKV7pzSbZePdnskA-RiLBxWexzVNNZyhEGtf0GjV439-PQx82IESbhJ-_gM9dweCANKa-Bn1vRofSyrX7DV4eo0Ppf6HDYbpvur3REvI8QOzTlgFO8eImQToOuPQzRE7JYLsCtTcY6hkxDc-3zYDKNPUXkz2lmceC79Lr0LZnk0NOPbiXCIYS9CktnqitjfPjUcra2zH0nrGlEJdN7EM6Qq7cgbY%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. **But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >>**
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b99f30e857a6424ba3908c811ff2db18&_e=DzbIsEGd6TASFvxcxcAGB6g8sRmTbeHWOHLYRU3Rk8yjv_lrod_R710uHVA91lH2aKJOHHJHhazsR8lqZe8IDrMexaFM5OYYvz0FyW0zZXaLH5qqXGHoUe6o_s9pzhWaM7bL6zqS3-eJ6HdzuygC4z-_PHoSkoiCDvzqvfAS48V4oHxGO8NadDA1Me1QC8B2gumWiox_T0Y0DM8ljleONOpUXf7lxi6TdsT9hT9nucB50lsXQIcz0SQvCOJyK4TCPyJU-VYgaM7eIvqjiBjtabMdTegSmuKD1Lq6s9FlLtwCDGl-Q4GT8ykzdLsO-Hmo6L_EMKwAE_HoCAUZIZlnd86CfuQv7tk4P8QjKlkFfB4EmHp2k2gHNcvzbeRwCJ073OL8f4mhTzevtFfBkC9afuPGDvdp6jnwBvitVlrAhUs%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b99f30e857a6424ba3908c811ff2db18&_e=DzbIsEGd6TASFvxcxcAGB6g8sRmTbeHWOHLYRU3Rk8yjv_lrod_R710uHVA91lH2aKJOHHJHhazsR8lqZe8IDrMexaFM5OYYvz0FyW0zZXaLH5qqXGHoUe6o_s9pzhWaM7bL6zqS3-eJ6HdzuygC4z-_PHoSkoiCDvzqvfAS48V4oHxGO8NadDA1Me1QC8B2gumWiox_T0Y0DM8ljleONOpUXf7lxi6TdsT9hT9nucB50lsXQIcz0SQvCOJyK4TCPyJU-VYgaM7eIvqjiBjtaa5gCBv1w-2GmJqoAAWqI_iPiU9qtmD1tOVcYwRD6QjEFmHaRvNS6jZNX72Hf3NDws78INvXYBLGVdF93LdGbP42Hdv1oX7BbWisFyZZ-i2HKA1NrzuBUSLTGxem5pcABur-ZVPleNm8uSYHcEYqzBk%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

Hillsdale College

clean_body: I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsPAFv3DNT

Strange...and disturbing.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osPAFv3DNT

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

What
strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you
have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries
being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire-all while
authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or
stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic
parishes in the United States?

How about
the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by
up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that
forced many houses of worship to close?

These
news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians
encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it
seems like faith in America is under siege.

That's
one reason we're releasing our latest free online course,
"Ancient Christianity," this month. I hope you'll enroll today
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61821521:sPAFv3DNT:m:3:2532013465:60CA134EFB26E0DECFBC786AF649478C:r

The
course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians
who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same
time, they shaped the Christian church and established the
foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

Their
examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.

For
instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution
of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin
Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a
lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he
wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and
immorality.

That's
why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting "Ancient
Christianity" to millions of your fellow citizens.

To
achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by
midnight on May 22 to share this important free online course
with as many people as possible.

The
faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online
courses possible. You also allow us to reach and teach millions
through other educational outreach efforts, like Imprimis and our
K-12 education programs.

And every
supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY
PENNY of taxpayer funding-even indirectly in the form of federal
or state student loans and grants.

We must
educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we
can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and
set an example for us to follow.

So, will
you help us reach and teach people just like you-urging them to
enroll in "Ancient Christianity"?

Using
this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our
development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of
$25, $50, or any amount.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61821521:sPAFv3DNT:m:3:2532013465:60CA134EFB26E0DECFBC786AF649478C:r

Together,
we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for
the next generation of Americans-so they don't have to live
through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

Would you have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire-all while authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence? Or stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic parishes in the United States? How about the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that forced many houses of worship to close? These news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it seems like faith in America is under siege. That's one reason we're releasing our latest free online course, "Ancient Christianity," this month. I hope you'll enroll today using this secure link: The course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same time, they shaped the Christian church and established the foundations of the Western world, including the United States. Their examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today. For instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and immorality. That's why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting "Ancient Christianity" to millions of your fellow citizens. To achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by midnight on May 22 to share this important free online course with as many people as possible. The faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online courses possible. You also allow us to reach and teach millions through other educational outreach efforts, like Imprimis and our K-12 education programs. And every supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY PENNY of taxpayer funding-even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. We must educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and set an example for us to follow. So, will you help us reach and teach people just like you-urging them to enroll in "Ancient Christianity"? Using this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or any amount. Together, we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for the next generation of Americans-so they don't have to live through even stranger times than the ones we live in today. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Do we put too many people in prison? – update from Mississippi’s conservative think tank
disclaimer_text: paid for by the victims of the violent crime
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133056?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Mississippi, we are often told, has an incarceration problem. Far too many people get locked up for too long, they say. **

**Over the past two decades, Mississippi’s prison population has in fact fallen by a quarter,** from 1,207 per 100,000 in 2002 to 916 per 100,000 by 2021. In January 2014 the prison population of our state was 21,008. By January 2022, that figure had declined to 16,931.

**Those who argue Mississippi should incarcerate fewer people have been getting exactly what they asked for.**

Now let’s take a look at what has happened to violent crime in our state over that time.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=76e5a27eb2&e=5703353baa)
---
| **From 2016 to 2022, violent crime in our state increased by 741 percent,** according to the Mississippi Department of Public Safety. We went from 538 violent crimes a year to 4,529. That is 3,991 more violent crimes and more victims.

Have those advocating for a lower prison population thought though the implications of their anti-prison agenda?

**Anti-prison advocates like to argue that locking people up in large numbers does not work.** Crime, they point out, was high even when Mississippi locked people up in greater numbers than almost anywhere else in America. The trouble is that Mississippi after these anti-incarceration reforms is a vastly more violent place that Mississippi was without them.

In 2013, the year before Mississippi enacted legislation designed to reduce the rate of incarceration, 28 people out of every 100,000 Jackson residents were murdered. By 2021, that number had nearly quadrupled to 101 homicide victims per 100,000 residents in our capital city.

**“You are being oversimplistic, Carswell!”, the critics will cry.** “The causes of crime are complex” I can hear them add. “How do you know reducing the prison population accounts for this extra crime? Correlation is not causation.”

Indeed it isn’t. **What we do know from research cited by Rafael Mangual of the Manhattan Institute is that the average state prisoner released has around five previous convictions.** That means that we have a pretty good idea of who is committing the lion’s share of the extra crime; those that have already been convicted and released.

“But it is so expensive to lock up so many people!” the reformists insist. Borrowing conservative language, they suggest that cutting the prison population would save taxpayer dollars.

**It is expensive to maintain prisons, just as it is expensive to maintain our country’s borders. But there are some things that the government needs to do even if costly.**

**As Shad White, our State Auditor has shown, leniency is expensive, too.** According to estimates by the State Auditor, each homicide in Mississippi costs taxpayers between $900,000 and $1.2 million. On top of that, of course, come all kinds of other costs paid for by the victims of the violent crime.

“But what about the human cost of incarcerating people?’, the anti-prison advocates are quick to ask. “Locking people up harms families, and the children of inmates suffer”.

**Anyone who assumes that releasing violent criminals back into the bosom of their families will automatically be good news for those families might not have met many violent criminals. **

Mississippi needs policy-makers makers to make policy on the basis of how the world is, not on the basis of how they might want it to be.

Eight years ago, back when every policy-maker in Jackson seemed intent on drifting along with the anti-incarceration vibe, we were told that there were better ways to reduce crime than by filling the prisons.

Unfortunately, we have yet to find them. **When you factor in for selection bias, there is remarkably little evidence that most rehabilitation programs have the efficacy that those who run them want them to have.**

**Anti-prison advocates are currently campaigning to have Mississippi’s Parole Board release more parole-eligible prisoners from custody.**

It is true that our Parole Board currently approves a lower percentage of parole applications now than it has done for years. But that is because there has been a massive surge in the number of people automatically entitled to apply for early release to the Parole Board.

Why the increase in parole applications? Because of legislation that the anti-prison advocacy groups helped pass which automatically entitles violent offenders to appeal to the Parole Board in the first place.

The Parole Board has recently been criticized for getting some parole decisions wrong. I can’t help wondering if the Board might have done a better job if they had not been flooded by new cases at the insistence of anti-prison activists.

**The tragedy of this misguided anti-prison agenda is not only that it is driving a surge in crime. It has detracted from Mississippi implementing the type of prison reform that conservatives ought to support. **

More needs to be done to make our prisons more humane. The prison system ought to do a far better job of differentiating between violent criminals and the non-violent. **With so many young men graduating from the prison system each year, surely we could do a better job of ensuring they emerge with a better set of life skills? **

These reforms are only going to be attainable if we have a prison system that achieves its primary purpose; locking up bad people in order to prevent them from doing bad things to good people. The longer we take to learn this lesson, the longer the list of victims.

**There is now overwhelming evidence that we should abandon Mississippi’s flirtation with an anti-incarceration agenda – and it is not just a question of crime.**

If Mississippi wants to see the kind of economic growth that other states have experienced, we need to reduce our crime rates.

Have a wonderful – and peaceful – weekend!

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a3d8d48d5c&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

Only Adam Schiff could have taught him lying is the best way to make a living. We will not stand idly by. Here is a post that about sums it up: Breaking: Congressman Dan Goldman (D) claims the FBI whistleblowers were bought and paid for by Kash Patel. The reality is the witnesses had their lives destroyed and Patel set up a fund for them to they could feed their families after the FBI suspended them without pay and left them unable to afford groceries... These brave patriots decided to put their lives and careers on the line for their country by exposing the truth about corruption within the FBI. I did not coach them, instruct them to do this, or buy them in any way. They provided critical information to Congress, exposing massive corruption at the FBI. Then, our foundation heard about their bravery and entered the fray. The Kash Foundation, my America-First non-profit organization, helped provide financial assistance through a donation so these patriots wouldn't lose everything after the great sacrifice they made for their country. I am declaring a FUNDRAISING EMERGENCY. Members of the U.S. Government are effectively accusing me of being a felon and destroying the lives of patriots. My goal is to raise $100,000 to immediately double down on the Kash Foundation's efforts to support whistleblowers and continue exposing the Deep State. Please use one of these links to donate ANY Amount: You and I cannot let these government gangsters destroy more lives and silence our voices. I am proud of The Kash Foundation and all of the America-First supporters who have stepped up to donate and support whistleblowers and others in need- victims of government overreach. Peter,

There was no collusion.

**Let me repeat that:** President Trump DID NOT collude with the Russians.

President Trump was not a Russian asset.

**President Trump didn’t make a deal with Vladimir Putin to rig the 2016 presidential election.**

**The Durham report released this week proved that WE WERE RIGHT ABOUT EVERYTHING.**

It’s a shame that it only took six years, two special counsels, and **more than $30 million in American taxpayer dollars to get to the TRUTH**.

**This report is about as damning report as you can see.**

But still, even now, the Left will just not relent. **The very people who told us that President Trump colluded with Russians are now telling the American people that they cannot trust the Durham Report**.

These are the same people that claim Joe Biden and his family's business dealings are above board.

_**How can we trust anything they say?**_

We’re committed to holding government accountable to YOU. But because of our steadfast commitment to holding government bureaucrats accountable, **we’re under constant attack**. Our only defense is fighting back against the liberal Left, who want me gone. **[Our continued ability to fight back requires buy-in from conservatives like you. name: Sen. Sydney Batch via Blue Amp Action
subject: North Carolina’s Republican legislators just voted to override the Democratic Governor’s veto of an extreme abortion ban. Help the Democratic State Senate Caucus fight back, and stand up for the majority of state voters that Republicans are determined to ignore.
body:
Abortion at risk in North Carolina
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d96537a-66ea-4717-ba21-770cd024ab5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_FIRST:_** North Carolina Republicans rushed through an extreme abortion ban. **_THEN:_** Our Democratic Governor Roy Cooper VETOED this harmful legislation. **_NOW:_** Republicans in the legislature just voted to override the Governor’s veto. This harmful legislation doesn’t represent the will of the people, and it doesn’t represent North Carolina values. That is why I—and the entire North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus—will continue to fight for reproductive rights. [**We aren’t done fighting. Can you split a $5 donation between North Carolina Senate Democrats and Blue Amp Action to fight back against these extreme Republicans and their attacks on reproductive rights?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td66933ab-9e20-490d-909e-97acddcb7872/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing with us, _Sydney Batch_ _NC Senate District 17_
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8355fb90-ce09-4335-8c65-2cbae45412e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/northcarolinaabortionban-ncsenatedems2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38fb737d-5392-44a0-8707-d6d6d4e87e87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter,
---
As a father and son of former law enforcement, I will continue to stand with our men and women in blue... and I know you will too.
---
This week House Republicans expressed support for local law enforcement officers and condemned efforts to defund or dismantle local law enforcement agencies.
---
Joe Biden, members of the “Squad” and other extreme Democrats are waging an unprecedented attack on our nation's law enforcement heroes, and I need your help to keep up the fight to continue backing the blue.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help me win my re-election so that I can continue fighting for the men and women in law enforcement in Congress.**](https://links.fitzgeraldforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=ae7ff012ae73495aac3e08309cb6b41c&_e=X8i-frDnoyMbbX_kFHR2D26xFlxRVWMdSdY6LL-p8-H81UAsFl9G048YB_8fYOHo8Rir4SWaC65u9oJSJJy33PtyquI64OlbMueZ-WX4UBOWTbJsjW8bROWGCKP2VLQmSbf2gOObi3SWmzSsrGw7liI1Obj5q5niYLYgj89uw2qh99TVqeBRjIWzwBU81yngjAMAuW1EHq6yiUMTRiY6oWeH2igRb4ekC5CZstW5J8ZJg9Z-oJ0AEDSJjtfGWdRZipYOcHyrlaCrxj_MLRTjUdmhy_av691CqjE1ONzCU_IQzk6o3oWfHMWSJ89IIZ1lGiv4dmRYtz2d-UN7RmfGgG5uDZ1zl3qsYbfoheUnIcA%3D)

clean_body: | Peter, As a father and son of former law enforcement, I will continue to stand with our men and women in blue... and I know you will too. This week House Republicans expressed support for local law enforcement officers and condemned efforts to defund or dismantle local law enforcement agencies. Joe Biden, members of the “Squad” and other extreme Democrats are waging an unprecedented attack on our nation's law enforcement heroes, and I need your help to keep up the fight to continue backing the blue. Thank you, Scott Fitzgerald Congressman (WI-05) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress PO Box 484 Oconomowoc, WI 53066
