name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Action needed re: abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I never thought that I’d see the day when my daughter has fewer rights than I did at her age.
| | |
---
Team –
I never thought that I’d see the day when my daughter has fewer rights than I did at her age.
But when _Roe_ was overturned, that’s exactly what happened. States across the country are instituting abortion bans and women and families are paying the price
I’m a big supporter of abortion rights. Always have been, always will be. But, I really need to know where you stand:
| | **Do you think that abortion should be legal?**
---
| | | [YES. I believe that everyone deserves access to safe and legal abortion](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63554616/407224985/-995453707?code=mh-jtk2280-su-in&ask=3&amounts=3,10,25,50,100&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VmYTE1Mi0xN2Y3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8LFTol4JqP_KeZ7kjXSDXTO96HrCjCcpqarC2_Aa58=&emci=f8ff01b9-7bf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f3efa152-17f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5452893)
---
| [NO. No one should be able to make their own reproductive health care decisions](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63554617/407224986/-995453707?code=mh-jtk2280-su-in&ask=3&amounts=3,10,25,50,100&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VmYTE1Mi0xN2Y3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8LFTol4JqP_KeZ7kjXSDXTO96HrCjCcpqarC2_Aa58=&emci=f8ff01b9-7bf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f3efa152-17f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5452893)
---
I’ll fight for reproductive rights for as long as I’m in the Senate, but it’s really important that I know where you stand so that I can take your opinion with me as I’m casting votes.
**[Please take my one question survey on abortion. It’ll only take a moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63554618/407224987/-995453707?code=mh-jtk2280-su-in&ask=3&amounts=3,10,25,50,100&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VmYTE1Mi0xN2Y3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8LFTol4JqP_KeZ7kjXSDXTO96HrCjCcpqarC2_Aa58=&emci=f8ff01b9-7bf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f3efa152-17f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5452893)**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: I never thought that I’d see the day when my daughter has fewer rights than I did at her age. | | | Team – I never thought that I’d see the day when my daughter has fewer rights than I did at her age. But when Roe was overturned, that’s exactly what happened. States across the country are instituting abortion bans and women and families are paying the price I’m a big supporter of abortion rights. Always have been, always will be. But, I really need to know where you stand: | | Do you think that abortion should be legal? | | | | I’ll fight for reproductive rights for as long as I’m in the Senate, but it’s really important that I know where you stand so that I can take your opinion with me as I’m casting votes. Thank you for sharing your thoughts. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63554980/407225899/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBlNjVlMy0xNmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6DIr_p-x24cummTu9DPjDWltw2yjhHKuxR2nmVtP0c=&emci=c46daf0a-7cf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ff0e65e3-16f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, I’m leading the charge to censure GOP Rep. Paul Gosar – and the reason is deeply personal. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63554986/407225909/-963963884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBlNjVlMy0xNmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6DIr_p-x24cummTu9DPjDWltw2yjhHKuxR2nmVtP0c=&emci=c46daf0a-7cf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ff0e65e3-16f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) Last week, it emerged that two of Gosar’s staffers are supporters of the avowed Nazi and prominent antisemite Nick Fuentes, and were photographed alongside him recently at a far-right rally. As a proud Jewish woman whose grandfather was murdered in the Holocaust, these revelations are deeply disturbing – but this isn’t just about my personal heritage. It is incredibly dangerous to allow members of Congress to harbor neo-Nazi extremists in their offices. **It would normalize hateful ideologies in the highest levels of our government, and as elected leaders, it is our duty to condemn it.** **I’m fighting to hold Congress to a higher standard, and to send a message that hate and violent extremism have no home in Washington. **[**Will you sign on in support of my resolution to formally censure Rep. Paul Gosar?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63554992/407225916/1867718266?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBlNjVlMy0xNmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6DIr_p-x24cummTu9DPjDWltw2yjhHKuxR2nmVtP0c=&emci=c46daf0a-7cf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ff0e65e3-16f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63554998/407225923/-963963884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBlNjVlMy0xNmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6DIr_p-x24cummTu9DPjDWltw2yjhHKuxR2nmVtP0c=&emci=c46daf0a-7cf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ff0e65e3-16f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)** In 2021, Rep. Gosar was formally censured and stripped of his committee assignments for sharing a cartoon depicting the murder of my colleague, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Now, Gosar’s behavior and rhetoric has gotten even more disturbing and antisemitic. This year, he compared the Ukrainian government to Nazis on Israel’s Holocaust Remembrance Day, shared a link in his official newsletter leading to an antisemitic website that deemed senior U.S. officials “Jewish warmongers”, and spoke at an international conservative summit attended by some of the world’s most prominent far-right figures. **At a time when antisemitism and hate crimes are reaching record-breaking levels, it's absolutely unacceptable that a sitting member of Congress employs a known neo-Nazi and supporter of white nationalist ideology.**[**I’m calling on Congress to officially censure Gosar – add your name here to stand with me in holding him accountable today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63555003/407225929/1867718266?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBlNjVlMy0xNmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6DIr_p-x24cummTu9DPjDWltw2yjhHKuxR2nmVtP0c=&emci=c46daf0a-7cf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ff0e65e3-16f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63555015/407225938/-963963884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBlNjVlMy0xNmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6DIr_p-x24cummTu9DPjDWltw2yjhHKuxR2nmVtP0c=&emci=c46daf0a-7cf6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ff0e65e3-16f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)** Thank you, Becca Balint

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene’s racist + dangerous words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=185%2E791427%2ET9t9d9)
Hey there, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:
In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.
**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.
This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.
**[We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Ilhan Omar and my campaign today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23-bowman-split.Q4AZ43&refcode=em230520-ilhan-1-t2&t=2&akid=185%2E791427%2ET9t9d9)**

DID YOU SEE THIS, friend?? I'm FUMING:

**Donald J. Trump just called the Jan. 6 attack on our nation a "beautiful day." **
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63556626/407232434/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2603-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MDZkZGEzLTBmZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zVk6yQx3h6mPhYYWePWIO4LVIoxf09YAa5Rik81CKgk=)
Ummmm....

_"Beautiful" my ass!_

Jan. 6 was one of the darkest days in our nation's history, when lives were lost thanks to Trump's lies. **Trump will do anything it takes to cling to power – even if it means inciting an insurrection that killed four Americans. **
Trump is a DANGER to our country and world, and we can't let him regain power. But he and his cronies have already raised $34 million for his presidential campaign, so we need to hustle if we want to catch up.
**I'm working with American Bridge to make sure we do just that, but we just went through our files and saw that your May 2023 Democratic Membership needs to be activated. That's a PROBLEM, friend.**

body:

| | Peter, did you see this quote from President Biden? [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cUtwuvifKXz_6VTP12pkXQwX8t2xGtFywEIsGFUtiUuDPHSN-pKo-FFt0X_hwvCzhs3Orp1BeiksY4uNDVg37T-5Di0xY6WVVWVpr_7tcp3BMv27QzYVqIgtydZ94BKZo3A2GAr6GNehVwK0cMv2o31IM-Cv-HOJvLZBBXW64pY9sHp5LtHsHw8xghhPcFDjdKDAviGZKTFO59CVdafSIyUGY8d8PtPd1CgSJjSD9X-tpCVbQDy4uRKaDSSHgHW5sRhe6R7vDHlgifMcXMAsi8zfqciKr_5hazWF4YtYHc8I3iUDDYe9VUyxfgdRFhcuGmsyDiVRcRMjmqftZjLxSaD_LnMHLEOjFyaV__-WIoX3zfLpDJkZmH0ZkHr9Xu3mhm3fd0qogBFTRu1z2h4Htb2zx3d69hyZtuLIjiCeuKV-9usbIJTLpC3ckWGUzu0S-ZW756JFvDQ0j7jNfZSJEGgjBsARz0WOCwSIBVDC7QMkkt9uT3lS5SnPAc96Ik7gzt4C8LfxDtLhiAG6ORN3mZBsLPSBxUgJofJZIhA1S3-bs1vuAKP2spzqjb_frN7On/3wc/2pZqjzNDTL28AmDLPN_1dQ/h1/eFo_9e5XYLfkYfiU6Ksd08_Be-Jnfro-0Xe8EtZNTv4) Moments like this remind us of why we are SO proud to call Joe Biden our President.

Look, we believe our government works best when we have representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities – something Joe Biden has also been working hard to do his entire presidency: from choosing **_Kamala Harris to serve as the first Black woman Vice President ever_** , to **_nominating 25 black judges to the Federal Court_** to **_lowering the unemployment rate for Black Americans to near historic lows_**.

President Biden and Vice President Harris have proven over and over again that they are deeply committed to advancing equity and racial justice and opportunity for Black Americans.

[But here’s the thing Peter. President Biden’s Republican opponent – racists like Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis – will do everything they can to undo the progress we’ve made for Black Americans and promote far-right white supremacy ideology. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, did you see this quote from President Biden? Moments like this remind us of why we are SO proud to call Joe Biden our President. Look, we believe our government works best when we have representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities – something Joe Biden has also been working hard to do his entire presidency: from choosing Kamala Harris to serve as the first Black woman Vice President ever , to nominating 25 black judges to the Federal Court to lowering the unemployment rate for Black Americans to near historic lows. President Biden and Vice President Harris have proven over and over again that they are deeply committed to advancing equity and racial justice and opportunity for Black Americans. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Brandolini’s law
body:
The bullsh*t asymmetry principle
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1006%2E120351%2En4bphm)
Hey Peter —
With Tucker Carlson’s firing and the Fox News/Dominion verdict taking up tons of mainstream media airtime, our team has been talking a lot about the**“bullsh*t asymmetry principle.”**
[**Before we dive into the bullsh*t, can you make a quick $5 contribution? A $5 donation can pack a powerful punch toward reaching today’s $5,500 fundraising goal and stopping the spread of bad information.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3714?refcode=em-20230520&t=2&akid=1006%2E120351%2En4bphm)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3714?refcode=em-20230520&t=3&akid=1006%2E120351%2En4bphm)**
**Brandolini's law, also known as the bullsh*t asymmetry principle** , refers to the huge amount of effort needed to debunk misinformation, in comparison to how easy it is to spread it in the first place.
**Consider this:** it takes seconds to tweet, minutes to record and upload a video, and mere hours for something to go viral — especially if you’re spreading clickbait designed to enrage and manipulate people.
But it takes days, months, or even years of effort — and tons of money and resources — to debunk this misinformation. Just think about how many people **_still_** believe Trump won the 2020 election.
Our newsrooms are at the forefront of this fight, correcting misinformation around elections and our democracy in the same online spaces where it spreads. At times it can be an uphill battle, but your support makes their work possible, Peter.
[**Will you make an $5 contribution today and help our eight local newsrooms fight back against bad information?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3714?refcode=em-20230520&t=4&akid=1006%2E120351%2En4bphm)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3714?refcode=em-20230520&t=5&akid=1006%2E120351%2En4bphm)**
Our commitment to meeting misinformation where it’s at and countering it with reliable, accurate stories will continue to be a critical initiative in support of our democracy — especially as the 2024 election season heats up.
Thank you for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1006_120351_n4bphm&akid=1006%2E120351%2En4bphm)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1006%2E120351%2En4bphm)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: NEWS via Sen. Rick Scott
subject: My service is not a publicity stunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Fellow conservative, it's Sen. Rick Scott.
---
| | Serving in the Navy was one of the greatest honors of my life.

Our troops are the backbone of this country, and I commend the service of the men and women who put their lives on the line to defend America.

**That’s why when a far-Left op-ed accused me of wearing my Navy hat as a “publicity stunt” to lie to the people of Florida, I was absolutely disgusted. **

I don’t wear my Navy hat to “lie” to my constituents. I wear it because I’m proud to have had the opportunity to serve in the greatest fighting force in the world.

**Insulting someone’s service because of their political views is the lowest of the low, but _THIS is what the radical Left and the fake news have sunk down to._**

**[Join me today to STOP socialist Democrats and their disgusting lies.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b848a9dfa10647e196684507537d9449&_e=YeVY5dmxBjQ4qn84Yonw_mJ9sUnZz8fimTomfvTBzK2NB2lYzemOMimQ_SW4tLMjbXLy7rCpMz1CaCzFIqcMsIff2_I3ZkBTC5MkxAgy8wOxgTJO7u99tKqC_gwmtj3lUNxwyoHjArqCc9mfa1xRAWwu7iZgwN02PEwITiCT2M7xbnOfDHDA0JyBjPUCIB0P8GO5y9iH3FMJ7m9ahAdjriSXgx6i0uaFyKnSgmgedZ0rbKxW59KS9CaYkRiTd8EmYau3cIKBoWtU7YMLlfyq454WqXa_W13GRHdC12Z4K1W1696XTo9_Jk2-YdxrPplO_VfGwC6SiLTKMvrDT5nmHml3Kov5Mkai2ddTl1B2od6gnEO7QaxU8I9YPqPJfQPNSQOzVMsr4XMlBZ1d1B5dFw%3D%3D)**

---
| | This op-ed claimed that I wear my Navy hat because all that comes out of my mouth are “lies.”

**It said that I was lying about the crisis at our border - and that in fact, there was _no crisis at all_.**

The Left is either delusional or just plain blind, Fellow conservative.

Take one look at a picture of our southern border and you can see that it’s completely out of control.

_But the Left could care less about facts._

**It’s time to set the record straight about who is lying.[Join me today and STOP the lying Left once and for all.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b848a9dfa10647e196684507537d9449&_e=YeVY5dmxBjQ4qn84Yonw_mJ9sUnZz8fimTomfvTBzK2NB2lYzemOMimQ_SW4tLMjbXLy7rCpMz1CaCzFIqcMsIff2_I3ZkBTC5MkxAgy8wOxgTJO7u99tKqC_gwmtj3lUNxwyoHjArqCc9mfa1xRAWwu7iZgwN02PEwITiCT2M7xbnOfDHDA0JyBjPUCIB0P8GO5y9iH3FMJ7m9ahAdjriSXgx6i0uaFyKnSgmgedZ2ua_-Jt_VADUZX_acXwB8t1eoO4Ssz81gEQUo0v6eiZCMUTfHO6FPBS1hZ93g2bBBy1bl-BMI7UrEoam4xXl3UG1XsJ-M6RHOVcXwhK-IO0fwIKbX6qL9I7tadjB62k96eB7fWHJpp00Eom1cjNdbcqOH9dZA9oy8049zRThSzOQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**STOP THE LYING LEFT**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b848a9dfa10647e196684507537d9449&_e=YeVY5dmxBjQ4qn84Yonw_mJ9sUnZz8fimTomfvTBzK2NB2lYzemOMimQ_SW4tLMjbXLy7rCpMz1CaCzFIqcMsIff2_I3ZkBTC5MkxAgy8wOxgTJO7u99tKqC_gwmtj3lUNxwyoHjArqCc9mfa1xRAWwu7iZgwN02PEwITiCT2M7xbnOfDHDA0JyBjPUCIB0P8GO5y9iH3FMJ7m9ahAdjriSXgx6i0uaFyKnSgmgedZ055t0C1SUdQnAZ1pV0Tjc5ez0efGua1mTk1N9Got1p8BZG4US0cflOEk3xl1n2uSxJQ1NPITU0kK_rs7dxISx48_HDlTRpmBtho-7FvyyAXv-ynaXYelRWEaTtwmySygxrIi-gPODVqK8eh6wUHeM1qIO8v3ltdY7XCd51WFGjSQ%3D%3D)

name: David Trone
subject: I’m a doer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,

As a Member of Congress, I've made it a top priority to deliver RESULTS .

In just two terms, I've had legislation signed into law to help end the opioid epidemic, improve mental health, reform our criminal justice system, and more.

Bottom line? I don’t just talk about progressive issues. I take action and get things done.

Now I'm running to represent Maryland in the US Senate. I’ll fight for the Bay State the same way: by rolling up my sleeves, putting my head down, and getting results.

So why am I emailing? I need as many folks as possible to know what we’re building together. Will you watch this video about our campaign and then share it with 3 people you think might be interested?

CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE VIDEO >> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pT5zAofQ6Ek&t=16s

Peter, I'm proud of what we've accomplished so far, but there is still more work to be done.

David Trone

Watch the Video >> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pT5zAofQ6Ek&t=16s

The GOP only needs to win **six** more state legislatures to call a Constitutional Convention and make this happen. **That's why EMILYs List is laser-focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women at the state level — but we need your help.** **[We can't let the GOP get their hands on our Constitution. Donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women and STOP this GOP scheme to ban abortion nationwide.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63559642/407243359/66865039?sourceid=1050081&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZmMjQwMC0xZmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KgXrtMKqYmYdL4FNZOleNusCuzGCY2rHR7UsvyqhWNA=&emci=8456a1cf-73f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e7ff2400-1ff7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

If Republicans succeed, the consequences for women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and so many others could be catastrophic. And that's exactly why we have to step up this cycle, Peter — not just for the big-ticket races, but also for our fearless candidates who can stop this anti-choice power grab at the state and local levels.

We've already made incredible progress on this front: in last year's midterms, we flipped _four_ state chambers from red to blue and secured _two_ new Democratic trifectas, controlling the state House, Senate, and governorship in Michigan and Minnesota. clean_body: | | | We have to 🛑 this GOP plan: → This would be a nightmare scenario, Peter: Republicans are trying to rewrite the U.S. Constitution to ban abortion across the country. The GOP only needs to win six more state legislatures to call a Constitutional Convention and make this happen. That's why EMILYs List is laser-focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women at the state level — but we need your help. If Republicans succeed, the consequences for women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and so many others could be catastrophic. And that's exactly why we have to step up this cycle, Peter — not just for the big-ticket races, but also for our fearless candidates who can stop this anti-choice power grab at the state and local levels. We've already made incredible progress on this front: in last year's midterms, we flipped four state chambers from red to blue and secured two new Democratic trifectas, controlling the state House, Senate, and governorship in Michigan and Minnesota. We can repeat this success in 2024 if we do what we did last cycle: make early investments in key races now. **The stakes couldn't be higher. Hall case in North Carolina could profoundly impact elections in parts of the state. That could make it more difficult for voters to make their voices heard and to have a shot at fair representation. And our team is prepared to continue the fight. = All On The Line is mobilizing grassroots activists in North Carolina and across the nation -- pushing back against these anti-democratic tactics to manipulate maps for extreme benefit. = We have fought tirelessly to push for decisive action on gerrymandering and the fair election of state legislators. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The court's decision puts the ball in conservative lawmakers’ court. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d7c9d63d69f40289785672d75a54e59&_e=aopEqjJYwKUgxMoSktJlk7GV8h6C6P-5qdR7NPrvuB4reJ5g7Yx5oWobJgEtmpyOGWdeUZyMY7YiJODmyYUnKJdQvzvhiO1khIt7AezxyNuveXJ7N0K66Dc7spRfgUzY5gGfD2wQoBsx0I7coG1RoiN1u82VprfuDILSRdXTG1zka_QBUiGXeQkgTVxgNemjoXbceOwCxoiiigr-BaI6_tUWRS0remiihzy15WyGWauaHrFStciSRk7aGsaaYENoaE_zxKUWEjhK90CAAvwwypMCg_uPQopEvNSxAu5uIPw5It8V6_keszDNa9K3wKHoFqH7AgBPhrwCiKUacAbJP04vM4Oe44TGdeHXVyzaPq47-NnSiecZaKy75IG8YjQVBDHHGPNB6QLry_Jr67Dk2tKxIaBB5kd0FOYTkKhviJKQuxMtZwLh9D3W2ne96f7u)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d7c9d63d69f40289785672d75a54e59&_e=aopEqjJYwKUgxMoSktJlk7GV8h6C6P-5qdR7NPrvuB4reJ5g7Yx5oWobJgEtmpyOGWdeUZyMY7YiJODmyYUnKJdQvzvhiO1khIt7AezxyNuveXJ7N0K66Dc7spRfgUzY5gGfD2wQoBsx0I7coG1RoiN1u82VprfuDILSRdXTG1zka_QBUiGXeQkgTVxgNemjoXbceOwCxoiiigr-BaI6_tUWRS0remiihzy15WyGWauaHrFStciSRk7aGsaaYENoaE_zxKUWEjhK90CAAvwwylWJ1inZ9LalhkVYBW4p331RuHZu0Qoy1w-D2yGIA3RqyZmYTA4oAaFpQMx_JRnafeGusnUcc2N_GgZ3NQj1jmc3BCBxqkT_ROiHs-fW2GkJz5ztTM5uUIUyHuPNGJV-mtg5SjK0cU4Gu4Cb85rseiIM8opkS8bOwRYnJCKLnK25)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d7c9d63d69f40289785672d75a54e59&_e=aopEqjJYwKUgxMoSktJlk7GV8h6C6P-5qdR7NPrvuB4reJ5g7Yx5oWobJgEtmpyOGWdeUZyMY7YiJODmyYUnKJdQvzvhiO1khIt7AezxyNuveXJ7N0K66Dc7spRfgUzY5gGfD2wQoBsx0I7coG1RoiN1u82VprfuDILSRdXTG1zka_QBUiGXeQkgTVxgNemjoXbceOwCxoiiigr-BaI6_tUWRS0remiihzy15WyGWauaHrFStciSRk7aGsaaYENoaE_zxKUWEjhK90CAAvwwyp8DnMllL8-H4VDQXZaXyMdrE8woxaSb5hM2ulF4QllPl-Tqh0VFMpaJ5UTHZKzyjeAg24vQUJHXY14hDW2vr45c1--vB7t4FXm9Y4fihzDhqE9_yQuSfK-mZIHnqAmrPXzqOg09yQNGPeAMozX2u8bMsTcmDrRcloe7dDLsr5_F)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Conrad Black
subject: Our nation desperately needs The New York Sun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWQCNd3DQN

You may already know that I spent most of my career in publishing
and helped build the third largest newspaper company in the
western world.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWQCNd3DQN

FROM THE
DESK OF CONRAD BLACK

You may
already know that I spent most of my career in publishing and
helped build the third largest newspaper company in the western
world.

We
published over 400 titles, including the London Daily Telegraph,
Chicago Sun Times, Jerusalem Post, Spectator, and most of the
leading newspapers in Canada and Australia.

I am
proud to have also been one of the founders of the modern New
York Sun, and believe that now, more than ever, it is a paper
that is uniquely suited for this moment of crisis in journalism.

Too many
journalists are not only failing to live up to public
expectations but are actively abusing public trust. Instead of
policing the powerful on behalf of the public, they police the
public on behalf of the powers they favor.

The New
York Sun has never lost sight of who it serves. It's a patriotic
newspaper that places principle over politics and people over
party. That is why I am happy to be a weekly contributor to it.
It maintains the highest professional standards without being
pedantic or boring. It's a community where I am proud to belong.

The Sun
is a lone voice among a sea of major publications owned by
multi-billion-dollar corporations that generally try to stifle
dissent.

The only
one way the Sun can win is if we all join in its effort.
Collectively we cannot be overwhelmed by any media conglomerate
or oppressive, woke, media groupthink. The Sun has long advocated
on our behalf. Now, if we join the Sun's movement to restore
American journalism, we will be unstoppable.

Membership starts at just 1¢ a day. I encourage you to sign up
now. Every single person counts.

Join the
Sun now →

Please
join us in the fight to restore America's journalism.

This is a
newspaper that our country desperately needs.

Conrad
Black
Columnist
for The New York Sun

Join the
Sun now →

Paid for by the New York Sun.

subject: I’m running for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Walker4NC
body:
My name is Mark Walker, and I’m honored to announce I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of North Carolina. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_t=mYLWunzwi0TnYLn0A_hjLPmkv-4of2-LrSqW_dkN_O1vjhFI6iE7wIFPV9pkR_2CXU0VldrrnVbdNmIh6ees_LT5f9AsAZrjJydo3MmQdi0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_t=mYLWunzwi0TnYLn0A_hjLPmkv-4of2-LrSqW_dkN_O1vjhFI6iE7wIFPV9pkR_2CXU0VldrrnVbdNmIh6ees_LT5f9AsAZrjJydo3MmQdi0%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF3xsiqPVxGs4HbKRylmWWSOPFLFqStcnTreSHAcsBJ7HedMIMzbCvdC7bG60YzDnqyx1fAVTdjoetApWw5DWYdHmE0FXhmOKwWANf0EMzI-fku2O54tjhbwW4Bk5o7BRGfNVuWJJ1-7JBwnrNKkylOL)

---
Peter,

I came to Winston Salem North Carolina 32 years ago with a few bucks to my name and the hope for better days ahead. Through God’s blessing and my wife Kelly’s support, I was blessed to be a pastor for sixteen years. _So, I know firsthand the despair that haunts so many._

But just like when I was a struggling young man, I have hope that there are **better days ahead**. And today, I’m proud to act on that hope and pave the path forward for all North Carolinians.

**My name is Mark Walker, and I’m honored to announce I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of North Carolina.** [**Today, we take the next step toward preserving American greatness and building a stronger state, one community at a time.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF2gKok-knNt-JJN79alUPJFBETcEpbIub2yHKpv04cqRsNbbhjbdLjbUxSQ9sQDejagdaIty-iS_EyMvaKATo3_WjtYyk9nfhmekyJfItLwt69an_tY62y4r03VmP1462ZpZlBTawDcuyy0GtC2c4wx)

[** LEARN MORE ABOUT MARK WALKER **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF1t1Sc3cnwVwwPM8r_hmxz48W_vew8TvE6ZkpmF8Ekc_bCGRWx-Qk9r1QLKFgot1ogX3SYSq06N8kP7pn5oCeENSBkun6uqD5y2wtxp_mHZ4YhpRX4_9liLvzz1ul_UDvrfJ1pV3LrPx1dx6OLonJEM)

[**Peter, it has never been clearer:_we cannot continue to operate under the failed policies of the Left and their outright attempt to ruin our state and our country._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF3tD0rP7segnTxFBnnruz9iYyHu0e02Sh_P80L80pSxX5tXCZuW53esM68xTsm0cnmtNkaV_H5K4qdwDV02nSCiva3_Hx3g-tLDudYBpvOBrLhGJxHCoeNx8vLsTgcyCpxpswMn6upFJgkSIxRB_XXw)

[**I’m running for Governor**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF3ukz1n9oACARHZzekHc6Y7oaqbPo7D7gcQCzEGK9BxZ1JOlHBzPIiSuFZKThMsR3VYj7bkPUt-cH_lduSigax9evcom6O2RRSaRB8EA1pja_FtNYUDfOWOrARdeZjte2wLNX7YrZ7U-vqdVQcz3jC7) to secure economic freedom in North Carolina. We can’t go on as a country facing crippling inflation, soaring taxes, and a constant hamster wheel of government handouts. We must make investments to recruit manufacturers for long-term job growth and build out critical infrastructure.

I’m running for Governor because someone needs to stand up for our children and remove DC bureaucracies from North Carolina classrooms! Every child is fearfully and wonderfully made by their Creator, and as a father myself I’m leading the fight to protect their precious minds from the diseased content Democrats are trying to teach them in school.

[** WATCH MARK WALKER’S VIDEO **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF37qVoS8FnLS95tXpPOCsywZ8dyXfX89b8mySL85uEb-Pfo9nfj8E3JLN7GWCflB4iPumFlQJDrAXxm5c-mleTpalVaxiSLSRaIrv17Irno3qzLjL1v8hHqjDoTD8ccAZPE3dhIviAFG5cdubJqNpn2)

**Peter, we are in a battle for the heart and soul of our country – and as far as I’m concerned, that battle begins in North Carolina.**

**As long as I have the Lord's guidance and with Kelly next to me, I’ll take the fight to both the radicals and the political elites...** [**_but I need you with me._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF3pewSniqVWhxHKL2u1U5KX6Y_jep-aKnicZ2wZ3S5bM_P2g8XW1TW6jnlSBm3goamMEaSzSfFrp3a6vK8FUT2LW8HSxS1PnzpIjUwsEdgQIW463h-PFNt1QfEBawE1Aev6gJ97iNYcsDGflqOnvyWw)

Let’s make North Carolina proud. Let’s build something together and let’s start today.

[**There are better days ahead – join me.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF14qbWL_GKBmDnLDFULCUdMRJ-B4qXuaaccCsnqXlAnELOL4U95uF6MhXGEAu_LpOLLyrWSKkWkqSeFC9_vOOpsbyNLw5morAzbHLWEyy3-mSCC3CCNqyP6DKZ8HnjZZOs2XBNis4w8isun5zVdpf4V)

[** SUPPORT MARK WALKER **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=80f85953dbfb4b57b619e31af4071b50&_e=jXgptcuxxos1E4-wFmS_T0qh-yXalALISuf3xl-2wd4IJXn4WSIlyXrZj37B8v9gRYt4h3n0OS0aNFVwQd8slPdW9HFwoaxO1F4ARJtCpi8kU7-U1gR0H0bBqoqInlNpe7QCbl8BjFckroWhugY06wTUvRQ_iSWFCVaWpwIpt2lWI2ZalcCD9J4yvTImSd8uQ5yC8UD29knDGFcic9lk6jiqKlV8Jz1TkIyeZyRVGF2PRX6W4oPBnjmRObHBPVtqnpfSDvRIYD4w1AZTk6vY1jeJvX0hKE6COwnZ_avflTHpbp3K8lEZM0_fyu-50tuHCtIyqFPXmEYrJUOM5Rl4JfkgVS_cZzVOkZ_KAFfBUfxov98-PMCUdp69VeYaLmXG)

For education, economic growith and public safety,

Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

clean_body: from MTG and MAGA extremists | | | Peter, We can’t sugarcoat this one: Our democracy is under attack by Marjorie Taylor Greene and MAGA extremists. In 2020, MTG led the charge to discredit the results of the Presidential election. She cheered on the January 6 insurrectionists, and people were killed as a result! In 2021, she cheered when the MAGA Georgia GOP passed one of the most restrictive voter suppression laws in the entire country! Last year, it came out that MTG’s MAGA friends illegally entered a polling place and stole voter data from polling machines. Now, MTG and MAGA Republicans are gearing up for 2024, and, MTG is a potential VP pick for Donald Trump, and if the GOP wins, she could do irreparable damage to American democracy! Peter, we have to act fast if we’re going to fight back against the GOP’s attacks on our democracy. Georgia will be the most important swing state in 2024, and we need a surge of resources now if we’re going to out-organize the GOP and win. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We’re counting on you to stand with us in this critical moment. Thank you, Democratic Party of Georgia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Just 80% of what we had in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Last fall we had 12,000 recurring donors, we’ll be honest, that number has dropped.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23256%2E3422442%2EgPNAcQ)
Derek,
You’ve heard us say it before: Our monthly donors help us plan ahead and sustain an effective campaign. Recurring donations really helped Katie win three competitive races in Orange County, but when we ended our campaign for Congress and launched Katie’s campaign for Senate earlier this year, **all of those monthly recurring donations automatically ended.**
Last fall, we had nearly 12,000 individuals who had a recurring donation, and we are SO thankful for each and every one.
But now we only have about **80% of the recurring donors we had last year.** And because we’re running statewide, we’re going to have to raise _even more_ money than we did last election cycle in order to stay competitive. **[Can you help us close the gap and commit to being a recurring supporter today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230520-1?recurring=1&refcode=EMAH20_1_REC_20230520_V1_F&refcode2=23256_3422442_gPNAcQ&akid=23256%2E3422442%2EgPNAcQ)**
**[Make a recurring donation ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230520-1?recurring=1&refcode=EMAH20_1_REC_20230520_V1_F&refcode2=23256_3422442_gPNAcQ&akid=23256%2E3422442%2EgPNAcQ)**
We appreciate every donation—recurring or not! Katie is running for the Senate because we need someone unafraid to stand up to big corporations and special interests and fight for working people. We’d be honored to earn your support.
Team Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230520-1?refcode=EMAH20_1_REC_20230520_V1_F&refcode2=23256_3422442_gPNAcQ&akid=23256%2E3422442%2EgPNAcQ)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH20_1_REC_20230520_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23256_3422442_gPNAcQ&akid=23256%2E3422442%2EgPNAcQ)**

Hi everyone, it’s Emilia. Before we enter the final week of May, I wanted to reach out personally to give you a campaign update.

It hasn’t even been five months since the new year began, but our race here in OH-13 is already heating up. Over the past few months, numerous election forecasters have called our district a pure toss-up and a must-win seat for reclaiming the Democratic House Majority, and multiple Republican groups have already funded attack ad campaigns against us.

It couldn’t be more clear that this race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, once again.

**But, Peter, I believe in this campaign. And I believe in our ability to continue to deliver real, lasting change for our Northeast Ohio community.**

However, in a race this competitive, the only way we’re going to be successful is if we come together – _and stick together_ – as a grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5 to our people-powered campaign today? On a grassroots team like ours, every single dollar makes a massive impact.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63560740/407247866/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.20_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGU3MGJhNC0yMWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a8RdE4qMbvKsMfji_TGfqIe3pWjSz8F8vqCuBy6demY=)

However, in a race this competitive, the only way we’re going to be successful is if we come together – and stick together – as a grassroots team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you so much for being on this team, Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: I’m going to do whatever it takes

body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=73%2E52803%2EXpcRmT)

| | I’m proud to share that my campaign for U.S. Senate was officially endorsed by EMILYs List! EMILYs List is on the front lines defending freedom in all forms, from reproductive health to economic justice to civil rights, voting rights and climate justice. **I can’t tell you how much it means to me to join their acclaimed ranks of pro-choice women candidates, particularly at this critical moment for the future of reproductive rights.** I won’t sugar-coat this: The nationwide assault on reproductive rights is a grave injustice that endangers millions. And as a mom raising a teenage daughter, I want her to enjoy all of the same rights and freedoms I’ve always been able to count on. But the solution isn’t just to grieve what we’ve lost. It’s to dig deep, gather up our strength and resources, and win it back. I promise that I will do whatever it takes to defend a woman’s right to choose in the Senate. **But first, I’ve got to build a winning campaign, and that takes a team effort. name: Adam Schiff
subject: A partisan farce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress.

| Peter, the Trump administration’s hand-picked special prosecutor just released a report that failed to find the deep state conspiracy theory Trump promised. Instead, Durham’s effort to discredit the FBI resulted in two failed prosecutions, and brought no new meaningful insight to an inquiry performed by the DOJ’s inspector general years earlier.

No one could be more disappointed than Trump and his chief enabler, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. So it’s no surprise that McCarthy chose to deflect questions about whether George Santos should resign while facing 13 felony charges — **_and instead suggested live on Fox News that the GOP should remove me from Congress entirely. All because Durham’s investigation was a bust._** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63561311/407250281/1815789988?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230520_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiNTk3YTMyLTIzZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R-JFMEzwAH_RwgbL4aKmgZb8RAHFGTAb4Ji_kD7cErY=) _“It really raises the question about Adam Schiff...What he put America through, and**openly lied** to us? And now it’s proven in this as well? It raises a lot of questions about his, just his character, his standing inside of Congress, and **whether he should even be in Congress.** ” — GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy_ McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress.

McCarthy’s constituents in California lack clean air and clean water, and lack access to broadband, and have hospitals closing down — but he can’t be bothered to do anything about it. He’s too busy trying to please the extreme MAGA crowd.

Well, if Kevin McCarthy won’t represent his constituents in the House, I will represent them in the Senate.

name: My name is Marsha Blackburn
subject: This email is a bit different than anything else in your inbox
body:
| |
---
| | | Hi there! My name is Marsha Blackburn.

This email is probably different from anything else in your inbox. _**[I wanted to take some time to share a bit about myself.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=42fa943e6a004a67b9d3e6ef183e5996&_e=PY7U85YJgUbt3C0bkZj7Cn1Smxpcim1f5DRYfxCg7PpstM_6dlvylZQHMvqWV5LALOXkud68pQv7tdCoPEozCYGJ4bSyvqYMnBb-kb_6fgAz51MEarkUEfBkqrQXAuXFWfx7BZz3A8jiogg93ANAT4glyooFNbMztmmdVBK_2pNcmsRSyB5YS5kudUSyocOSjg5435Mbj8xrCtvA7emVS-gYaDdM13-DysLRePusH-FI0l2vPFEzjoMunW3ZNsbdv8XKsgkTdN_VtSKfrfPCvbFCK9K4o3NGfVLQRderr4C3VAHVYi77BNSBX5wSpimdWrFlBXMSqju4Uevxe5uYuSk_ejZa3lUTxLKyg7OwGp_PLv5snvDtAhbD_8S2kQIG "I wanted to take some time to share a bit about myself.")**_
I'm the first female Senator for the great state of Tennessee.

Country music is always on in my home.

I love to cook Sunday lunch for my kids and grandkids.

I'm a proud Conservative.

I'm a God-fearing Christian.

I love this beautiful country of ours.

I just endorsed President Donald J. Trump for 2024.

I'm the one who asked Joe Biden's Supreme Court pick what a woman is.

_(She 's the one who couldn't answer because she's "not a biologist"...)_

I helped get Joe Biden to repeal his vaccine mandate for our troops.

And I never cave to the woke mob.
I have a sneaking suspicion that you and I have a few things in common. So if you want to see a like-minded conservative patriot fighting for the things that matter to YOU in Washington, I'm humbly asking you to make a _**[small contribution](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=42fa943e6a004a67b9d3e6ef183e5996&_e=PY7U85YJgUbt3C0bkZj7Cn1Smxpcim1f5DRYfxCg7PpstM_6dlvylZQHMvqWV5LALOXkud68pQv7tdCoPEozCYGJ4bSyvqYMnBb-kb_6fgAz51MEarkUEfBkqrQXAuXFWfx7BZz3A8jiogg93ANAT4glyooFNbMztmmdVBK_2pNcmsRSyB5YS5kudUSyocOSjg5435Mbj8xrCtvA7emVS-gYaDdM13-DysLRePusH-EiWRzG5pSMXR58Cqh3WumVHcdllqkJWDheqW6ihoBlW0jmCEg5uuouc3zlI9Kz6rXTgMR_NypyGqvF6OqUAgFJsQ1G7i_h6ShmP3Ujsl_b0SaZx5pLUba2HrOuFcpqxgmO2w-bPTGR-CgbQlwj9fx3 "small contribution")**_ today.

**I know the economy isn 't what it was under President Trump, so if you can't make a donation right now, I completely understand. The time you've taken to read this email is more than enough.**

_**[But if you can spare fifty, twenty, or even just five bucks, I would greatly appreciate it. Every single dollar counts, and I promise it will be put to good use.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=42fa943e6a004a67b9d3e6ef183e5996&_e=PY7U85YJgUbt3C0bkZj7Cn1Smxpcim1f5DRYfxCg7PpstM_6dlvylZQHMvqWV5LALOXkud68pQv7tdCoPEozCYGJ4bSyvqYMnBb-kb_6fgAz51MEarkUEfBkqrQXAuXFWfx7BZz3A8jiogg93ANAT4glyooFNbMztmmdVBK_2pNcmsRSyB5YS5kudUSyocOSjg5435Mbj8xrCtvA7emVS-gYaDdM13-DysLRePusH-FQIWBqm2BOLFEf-xMTUhOLlKemyNAXTDBzu-J1siiGnQ7dvTARCzWCSomI1PKtltDB_CpLVKMzkn9hSHzm4j6HgEnA8qQMpl1Ec6dKfvUP24Hh6Bh95yCwqADef2FuYkUfFzqzO7w5asIqHc7_FkhZ "But if you can spare fifty, twenty, or even just five bucks, I would greatly appreciate it. Every single dollar counts, and I promise it will be put to good use.")**_

Either way, it's an honor to represent your voice in the Senate.

God bless you, and have a great rest of your day,

Marsha
---
| |

* * *
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=42fa943e6a004a67b9d3e6ef183e5996&_e=PY7U85YJgUbt3C0bkZj7Cn1Smxpcim1f5DRYfxCg7PrVBfGqic-zkgdH_DzhvWoxhWAA2MY0oSyrr4a1MF3knQcNXqmYM1Ztoxw4NbEKxARHJ4GflRoGLUbGl-zbfH7TAah1-S3-oeSN3kcD9VBQP3FkdEsdsLSVhJ7vG42neWK0MG7oF7hnZCwX_WnyJ0PUV6i-tFTlRaueeI3CFB-AMCfNeUH7s-WK5VqjnxNjH4Xg3WK2lDty5MePvzjurbat2hcp-UX6IalNmX16rWAHQGIvQZuhXEc0dB16KYxhpipzLw3-UXDdFzGNCYfuf8Ey0l7kky2uiANPRkMbTKIBBjIS8fbhXTYUbSe-Nnoqpw6ZdtFmudpvETF-uOzSdCYS "Marsha Image Footer")
---
| |
_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=42fa943e6a004a67b9d3e6ef183e5996&_e=PY7U85YJgUbt3C0bkZj7Cn1Smxpcim1f5DRYfxCg7PrVBfGqic-zkgdH_DzhvWoxhWAA2MY0oSyrr4a1MF3knQcNXqmYM1Ztoxw4NbEKxARHJ4GflRoGLUbGl-zbfH7TAah1-S3-oeSN3kcD9VBQP3FkdEsdsLSVhJ7vG42neWK0MG7oF7hnZCwX_WnyJ0PUV6i-tFTlRaueeI3CFB-AMN_ib2s-enh6fbbwUjeu-cMNdGxBJfCgiMAxJRxCNPn9WP9vgC968xJyG_SiKPn1yX_06auNjS1C-YTviPJ6LSGUO9cES6LsgKSUI1tQeJAVoevryhqTQKBCyEknB4eMb0Hah1PynDmNLPIPPnqQMaFobYD4MaIRtMjFl07XlySG "please, click here to support my efforts if you can. ")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn
---
| | [SUPPORT MY FIGHT](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=42fa943e6a004a67b9d3e6ef183e5996&_e=PY7U85YJgUbt3C0bkZj7Cn1Smxpcim1f5DRYfxCg7PrVBfGqic-zkgdH_DzhvWoxhWAA2MY0oSyrr4a1MF3knQcNXqmYM1Ztoxw4NbEKxARHJ4GflRoGLUbGl-zbfH7TAah1-S3-oeSN3kcD9VBQP3FkdEsdsLSVhJ7vG42neWK0MG7oF7hnZCwX_WnyJ0PUV6i-tFTlRaueeI3CFB-AMN5UJewHKx9r8_E1NguKYCHjnj5noCuQWFBBw8mgDadEb0JZirlmXO5InWxjujcS_sCOUmiu5uSje478_atU14zMdCg_hjKJF2Wbi8-jYTjXenZAd81CULAg7P855S7a7lnb8sdHOp9r94FLiIXeJrKtXDI-HZunkEOIVj69VqcQ "SUPPORT MY FIGHT")

clean_body: Brandon needs your answer. | = Tate Reeves is shaking in his boots, Peter. It’s important that you respond before the end of today! Deadline: May 20, 2023 | 11:59 P.M. No one will outwork Nikki Haley. This week, Nikki wrapped up her 22nd event and her fourth swing in the Hawkeye State. It was a jam-packed week of town halls and meet and greets across Ankeny, Waterloo, Dubuque, Davenport, and more. Nikki met with hundreds of voters to discuss the state of her race, the future of our country, and her plans to make America strong and proud. Nikki is headed back to New Hampshire NEXT WEEK where she will launch her https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a00a68fe08cc508baef9dd4b747022d69ede8b7474123a133bde7c64eba92defac21ac93d5a53c8330d95d5284f11db6a7bbb19741b5bb640764fe7e0ba25685 Veterans for Nikki coalition, and host her FIRST New Hampshire https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a00a68fe08cc508b2933aff16a7a4bc2790a7a4e8b0b8f4c07e5f58ebe7c5e1cd5483656daf7c87819ab59787a00011c01e12a6df71aafb1b999c59c8e2cca1c Women for Nikki event. Take a look at this week's highlights. IOWA RECAP: Ankeny KCCI:“Haley plans to run a traditional grassroots campaign in Iowa, making consistent stops across the Hawkeye state. Each time she takes the stage, she tells Iowans that ‘no one will outwork me.’( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a00a68fe08cc508b0ca19d85bfc48e65cb26766f131df014a3494f8a0adc0e7e62ca2299e6fea17fe6da37a8f5fd72c87b9595d44eeef34214b2a7873f2e91a5 KCCI , 5/17/23) Rep. Zach Nunn:“.@NikkiHaley is right - it’s time to take the ‘kick me’ sign off our backs. The beast from the Southeast was in #Ankeny tonight to share a fiery message for America’s future with a standing room only crowd. #IowaCaucus2024” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a00a68fe08cc508b6bd7da58145437f4e087cd82662e2ca7bbcb45e12596119a23522568d11ebf4af71e867a66ce2654efb148ef07fb952b94b679e5bee1a36f Twitter , 5/17/23) And Haley, the only female candidate among the major contenders for the Republican presidential nomination, will also launch a Women for Nikki New Hampshire coalition. The announcements, shared first with Fox News on Thursday, will come as the former two-term South Carolina governor who later served as ambassador to the United Nations makes her fourth swing through the Granite State since declaring her candidacy for the White House in February.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a00a68fe08cc508b3e6b0e8860cac487f81b5cd60c3cc4cbd72a87fbbac6b6046364fb082f47151aeccdbe1364799ceea4925cb8315d0c64c66d350fc04a579b CONTINUE READING >> Nikki Haley lambasted District Attorney Alvin Bragg for charging Marine Daniel Penny and called on New York Governor Kathy Hochul to pardon Penny. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a00a68fe08cc508b8a1015291257088ff4c0a18c7f54753a9f016b9a8b71c357a9ffb871549eae6cab429405c040dce6990e13273cede96f9b05dba7c62e2300 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a00a68fe08cc508b8a1015291257088ff4c0a18c7f54753a9f016b9a8b71c357a9ffb871549eae6cab429405c040dce6990e13273cede96f9b05dba7c62e2300 WATCH NOW Nikki Haley sat down with Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino on America's Newsroom to discuss the Durham report. No one will outwork Nikki Haley. This week, Nikki wrapped up her 22nd event and her fourth swing in the Hawkeye State. It was a jam-packed week of town halls and meet and greets across Ankeny, Waterloo, Dubuque, Davenport, and more. Nikki met with hundreds of voters to discuss the state of her race, the future of our country, and her plans to make America strong and proud. Nikki is headed back to New Hampshire NEXT WEEK where she will launch her Veterans for Nikki coalition, and host her FIRST New Hampshire Women for Nikki event. Take a look at this week's highlights. IOWA RECAP: Ankeny KCCI:“Haley plans to run a traditional grassroots campaign in Iowa, making consistent stops across the Hawkeye state. Each time she takes the stage, she tells Iowans that ‘no one will outwork me.’( KCCI , 5/17/23) Rep. Zach Nunn:“.@NikkiHaley is right - it’s time to take the ‘kick me’ sign off our backs. The beast from the Southeast was in #Ankeny tonight to share a fiery message for America’s future with a standing room only crowd. #IowaCaucus2024” ( Twitter , 5/17/23) Des Moines Register’s Francesca Block:“@BrennaBird praises Iowa as a ‘bright spot’ in the rest of the country and says the country needs more strong conservative leadership. ‘We are looking for strong leaders to take our country back and we‘ve got that in @NikkiHaley,’ she said.” ( Twitter , 5/17/23) Waterloo The Waterloo-Cedar Falls Courier:“Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley said she’s been underestimated in everything she’s ever done – but that makes her ‘scrappy’ and a hard worker.” ( The Waterloo-Cedar Falls Courier , 5/19/23) Dubuque Dubuque Telegraph Herald: “Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley told a crowd Thursday in Dubuque that the way back to a time in America focused on ‘faith, family and country’ was to move forward from recent politics.” ( Dubuque Telegraph Herald , 5/19/23) Davenport WVIK:“Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley ended her latest campaign trip to Iowa with a town hall event in Davenport.”( WVIK , 5/19/23) WHAT VOTERS ARE SAYING "To me she feels like she gives honest answers and she's down-to-earth and she doesn't try to play the political game." “I’ve followed Nikki Haley since she was the governor of South Carolina and when she was an Ambassador. I think it's really important that we have positive female representation in the Republican Party, and I think she is a great role model for young women.” IN THE NEWS Fox News: Haley to launch Veterans for Nikki coalition during NH stop next week “Republican presidential candidate and former governor and ambassador Nikki Haley will unveil her Veterans for Nikki coalition next week during a two-day swing through New Hampshire, the state that holds the first primary and second overall contest in the GOP presidential nominating calendar. And Haley, the only female candidate among the major contenders for the Republican presidential nomination, will also launch a Women for Nikki New Hampshire coalition. The announcements, shared first with Fox News on Thursday, will come as the former two-term South Carolina governor who later served as ambassador to the United Nations makes her fourth swing through the Granite State since declaring her candidacy for the White House in February.” CONTINUE READING >> Nikki Haley lambasted District Attorney Alvin Bragg for charging Marine Daniel Penny and called on New York Governor Kathy Hochul to pardon Penny. WATCH NOW Nikki Haley sat down with Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino on America's Newsroom to discuss the Durham report. She was unequivocal: “Heads need to roll.” WATCH NOW UPCOMING EVENTS RSVP → Bedford Town Hall: Wednesday, May 24 at 11:30 am RSVP → Concord Town Hall: Wednesday, May 24 at 4:00 pm RSVP → Rye Backyard BBQ: Wednesday, May 24 at 6:30 pm If you haven’t followed Nikki Haley on social media yet, make sure to follow her on Facebook , Twitter , and Instagram for more of the latest updates. Have a wonderful weekend! -Team Haley DONATE NIKKI HALEY MERCHANDISE HIGHLIGHT: A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley this summer is with your very own Strong & Proud not Weak & Woke drink cooler ! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your drink cooler today! > GET YOURS NOW! NIKKI HALEY’S OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN STORE: VISIT STORE → JOIN TEAM HALEY With Election Day more than a year out, you may be wondering: Does my donation today really make an impact? The answer is, unequivocally, YES! Grassroots support is what Nikki’s fight to save America is built on. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor. Your generous support today will allow Nikki and our team to host town halls, hold rallies, meet with voters, and spread her conservative message all around the country. We’re just getting started and would love to have you on Team Haley! ">So, if you can spare it, a donation of $1, $10, or ANY amount goes a long way to help Nikki reach more voters! >> P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time toText NIKKI to 48324 and share this with 5 friends today! name: Adam Schiff (via RBG)
subject: A partisan farce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress.
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17424?t=6&akid=1817%2E564421%2EGmhymH) The Trump administration’s hand-picked special prosecutor just released a report that failed to find the deep state conspiracy theory Trump promised. Instead, Durham’s effort to discredit the FBI resulted in two failed prosecutions, and brought no new meaningful insight to an inquiry performed by the DOJ’s inspector general years earlier.

No one could be more disappointed than Trump and his chief enabler, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. So it’s no surprise that McCarthy chose to deflect questions about whether George Santos should resign while facing 13 felony charges — **_and instead suggested live on Fox News that the GOP should remove me from Congress entirely. All because Durham’s investigation was a bust._** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17412?t=7&akid=1817%2E564421%2EGmhymH) _“It really raises the question about Adam Schiff...What he put America through, and**openly lied** to us? And now it’s proven in this as well? It raises a lot of questions about his, just his character, his standing inside of Congress, and **whether he should even be in Congress.** ” — GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy_ McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress.

McCarthy’s constituents in California lack clean air and clean water, and lack access to broadband, and have hospitals closing down — but he can’t be bothered to do anything about it. He’s too busy trying to please the extreme MAGA crowd.

Well, if Kevin McCarthy won’t represent his constituents in the House, I will represent them in the Senate.

[**We HAVE to respond to this latest attack. Split an urgent donation to Ron Be Gone and our campaign to send a message to McCarthy loud and clear — we’re not going anywhere »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17413?t=9&akid=1817%2E564421%2EGmhymH) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17419?t=15&akid=1817%2E564421%2EGmhymH)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17420?t=16&akid=1817%2E564421%2EGmhymH)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17421?t=17&akid=1817%2E564421%2EGmhymH)
The harder that MAGA Republicans fight us, the more important it is that we fight back.

Since the day McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, to the day I announced this campaign, to this very moment, McCarthy has been fighting me tooth and nail.

**He’s willing to use a Trump administration political operative’s report to smear me once again while excusing criminal behavior and serial dishonesty within his own caucus.**

But that’s the MAGA Republican Party for you — pure projection and hypocrisy.

[**I need your support to fight back against these attacks. Split $3 or any amount to Ron Be Gone and our campaign to help.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17413?t=19&akid=1817%2E564421%2EGmhymH)

Thanks, team,

Adam

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Three things to know about this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
What you need to know about this race for Kentucky governor Peter,

With the primary behind us, all eyes are now on Kentucky. Here are the top three things you need to know about this race for Kentucky governor:
1. **Andy is facing Mitch McConnell's protégé, Daniel Cameron, in the general election.** Cameron will do whatever it takes to undo the progress we've made for Kentucky.

2. **This will be the most competitive race in the nation.** Andy won by just over 5,000 votes in 2019 and this year is shaping up to be just as close.

3. **This race will be expensive.** Over $12 million dollars was spent during the primary. Now that Andy has an opponent, millions more will flood Kentucky to attack him.

All of the progress that Andy has made – infrastructure investments, expanded access to health care, education improvements – is on the line this November. We can't afford to let Andy's opponent and his outside spending allies drag us backward. But we need your help to win this difficult race.

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Honoring those who serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress
body:
Team, Happy Armed Forces Day!

On this third Saturday of May, we celebrate and thank each and every individual who has put on a uniform in defense of our country. Personally, I’m so proud to be the granddaughter of two World War II Veterans, each who fought tirelessly to ensure not just America but the world had their freedoms protected and their rights restored. It is because of both our active military members and our Veterans that we are still able to live in the land of the free and the home of the brave.

AndI’m now even prouder to be a Member of Congress, where I can give back to those who have been a part of our Armed Forces. Earlier this year, as a Member of the House Committee on Veteran Affairs, I created the Veterans Advisory Council – a group of local veterans, active duty service members and stakeholders in Southern and Central Illinois who are helping me bring guidance and recommendations to my fellow Congressional colleagues on how we can improve access to benefits and services for military members.

It’s not enough to just thank these patriots. We must break down the barriers that prevent so many of our military members from receiving the benefits they are entitled to. We must ensure our country supports them and uplifts them from the moment they enlist, and beyond.

So on this Armed Forces Day, I’m asking you to join me in demanding that Congress prioritizes giving back to our military members and their families. Will you add your name next to mine in support of expanding our military’s access to health care and more? https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/a/petition-armed-forces-day?refcode=EM_PET_230520AFDay_NB_6_TESTA_PT

Forever grateful,

Nikki

--

Paid for by Nikki For Congress
Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

Please, consider making a one-time contribution by clicking here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=EM_PET_230520AFDay_NB_6_TESTA_PTfooter&amount=10

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: I’m reaching out directly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right-wing Republican, Ken Calvert.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63563924/407260997/395234972?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230516-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGZiNDQ0LTJjZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WfD6TOPjwlWl8Oo0SpVROdXEjIMBN0dw0N81wJn5bs=)
---
**Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right-wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time, and money to this race, and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[_**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $10 donation between Will’s campaign and Fight for Progress to help him launch with strength? Will can win this thing, so please donate now.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63563925/407260998/395234972?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230516-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGZiNDQ0LTJjZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WfD6TOPjwlWl8Oo0SpVROdXEjIMBN0dw0N81wJn5bs=)

Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:

**1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.

**2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.

**3\. GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!

**4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

[_**Please split a $10 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Fight for Progress today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! We need lots of Democrats to step up right out of the gate.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63563929/407261002/395234972?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230516-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGZiNDQ0LTJjZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WfD6TOPjwlWl8Oo0SpVROdXEjIMBN0dw0N81wJn5bs=)

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right-wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: I will defeat George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish.

He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother
survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City.

He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked
for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats.

These claims were lies — all of them.

And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos
told to get elected.

George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state,
and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including
money laundering and fraud.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18961?t=1001&akid=3251%2E346206%2Ej-oLdK ][IMG]

So, I've announced my intention to run for Congress to replace him.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18961?t=1002&akid=3251%2E346206%2Ej-oLdK ]My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch
in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help me send George
Santos into political retirement?

CHIP IN →

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18961?t=1003&akid=3251%2E346206%2Ej-oLdK ][IMG]

I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious
persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when
-- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place
where women had real rights and could determine their futures.

I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran
for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and
the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to
perform them.

Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican,
flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for
the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills
codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns.

Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people
of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing
about him.

Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and
pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our
values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18961?t=1004&akid=3251%2E346206%2Ej-oLdK ]But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m
asking: Will you split $25 between Charles Booker and my campaign to help
me defeat George Santos?

My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters
here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s
time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values

Let’s win this thing,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230520-3251-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3251_346206_j-oLdK&akid=3251%2E346206%2Ej-oLdK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3251%2E346206%2Ej-oLdK

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
