name: Team AOC
subject: $11 million against Alexandria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Here’s why your donation today would mean so much
#
We wanted to take a moment to explain why your contribution today would mean so much to our campaign to re-elect Alexandria:
1. November 5, 2024 might sound far away but our campaign organizes and operates year-round. We’re investing in deep organizing — both locally and nationally — to build long-term organizing power with our neighbors and allies.
2. Alexandria’s Republican opponent spent over $11 million dollars to try and stop our movement in 2020. We have to be prepared for millions more to be spent against us again this election.
3. Alexandria is constantly the target of vitriolic campaigns from Fox News and other right-wing media outlets. Your contribution will help us counter these attacks by getting her real message for a better world out over the constant stream of disinformation.

**Alexandria doesn’t accept a single dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists.** Instead, we’re relying on our grassroots supporters to donate what they can, when they can.
Our fundraising has been a bit slower so far this month than in April, but there’s no reason to panic. [If you can afford it, will you contribute $3 to help sustain this movement for the long term and make sure we have the resources to re-elect Alexandria?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230520.b1cd1g&refcode=em20230520-4354-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230520.b1cd1g&refcode=em20230520-4354-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D)**
We completely understand that not every person can donate to every email we send. No matter if you can donate today or not: thank you for being a part of this movement for economic, environmental, racial, and social justice for all.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230520?refcode=em20230520-4354-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=21&refcode2=4354_2526796_iFUD1D&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230520-4354-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4354%2E2526796%2EiFUD1D)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Release the Manifesto

name: Katie Hill
subject: it’s dangerous to be a woman in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564026/407261405/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230520_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmViZjc1NDEtMmRmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PxnNU-NUzLQbWbdisEwHKlESzCix-lS9K0jVJMqBEKM=)
---
I’m never going to be afraid of telling you the hard truth, Peter, and here it is: It’s dangerous to be a woman in politics. A recent study from Princeton University and the Anti-Defamation League found female officials are _3.4 times more likely_ to receive online harassment than their male counterparts. And it’s not just digital threats, either. In the past few years we’ve witnessed a violent intruder show up to Nancy Pelosi’s home with rope, zip ties, and a hammer; a man with a gun stalk Pramila Jayapal outside her house; and a thwarted plot to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer. **Then there’s what happened to me: A coordinated cyber-attack by far-right political operatives and media outlets meant to shame me out of office. ** After the attack on her husband, Nancy Pelosi said she was worried it would discourage other women from running for office. That’s something I worried about, too — and it’s not unfounded. When we say women running for office need extra support, we mean **every** type of support. There are so many invisible challenges and dangers that come with being a woman in politics, and that’s why I started HER Time: To help women overcome them. [_**But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you, Peter, to help me support women running for office with a donation of any amount today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564027/407261406/-1193769910?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230520_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmViZjc1NDEtMmRmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PxnNU-NUzLQbWbdisEwHKlESzCix-lS9K0jVJMqBEKM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564028/407261407/-1193769910?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230520_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmViZjc1NDEtMmRmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PxnNU-NUzLQbWbdisEwHKlESzCix-lS9K0jVJMqBEKM=)

Today, we’re training 170 more IDCCA Boot Camp alumni to start the 2024 Blue Wave.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564126/407262025/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230520BCfin_KZ_90DO_3_NG_A_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjgxNjFkMTUtMmVmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=743rs4c-KFN7axM8pp97z5ViPtwCKpFnFaJWTvPdzSQ=)
Fellow Democrats, today I’m at the 7th Annual IDCCA / NDTC Boot Camp, where we’re training 170 Democratic candidates, staffers, and leaders who will help lead the 2024 Blue Wave and beyond.

I am again impressed with this year’s Boot Camp class. They share our progressive values and are determined to keep Illinois a solidly Blue state. The tools they are leaving with today are the tools they need to strengthen our Democratic Party in every corner of the state.

I look forward to seeing today’s Boot Camp Trainees, working alongside our more than 1,200 Boot Camp Alumni, make 2024 another Blue Wave throughout Illinois. I expect our Alumni to make big things happen.

**[We couldn’t do this work without supporters like you. Will you pitch in $10 today to help us train even more and continue leading the way building crucial Democratic infrastructures throughout Illinois?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564127/407262026/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230520BCfin_KZ_90DO_3_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjgxNjFkMTUtMmVmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=743rs4c-KFN7axM8pp97z5ViPtwCKpFnFaJWTvPdzSQ=)**

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Abortion Access is under attack in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
In Congress, I will never stop advocating for safe and accessible reproductive healthcare.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564210/407262283/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230520-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODg5MGMzZC0yZWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHnvozTfSjMttXbqhWmrjGPzznX2fJXCfNggmQqIHAc=)
---
| Peter,

The Republican Party in North Carolina is hellbent on stripping North Carolinians of their reproductive freedom.

Soon after gaining their veto-proof majority, they quickly moved to ban abortion at 12 weeks, denying North Carolinians access to safe reproductive care. As North Carolina’s GOP continues to push through this legislation, it’s vital we work together to send a clear message that North Carolina stands for reproductive freedom.

In Congress, I will never stop advocating for safe and accessible reproductive healthcare. But standing up to extremist Republicans requires heavy resources. **We are trying to raise another $1,000 before the end of the day.[_Peter, if you’re able, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare so I have all the resources at my disposal to fight back?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564211/407262284/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230520-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODg5MGMzZC0yZWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHnvozTfSjMttXbqhWmrjGPzznX2fJXCfNggmQqIHAc=)**

clean_body: In Congress, I will never stop advocating for safe and accessible reproductive healthcare. | = | Peter, The Republican Party in North Carolina is hellbent on stripping North Carolinians of their reproductive freedom. Soon after gaining their veto-proof majority, they quickly moved to ban abortion at 12 weeks, denying North Carolinians access to safe reproductive care. As North Carolina’s GOP continues to push through this legislation, it’s vital we work together to send a clear message that North Carolina stands for reproductive freedom. In Congress, I will never stop advocating for safe and accessible reproductive healthcare. But standing up to extremist Republicans requires heavy resources. We are trying to raise another $1,000 before the end of the day.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Grateful for your support, Valerie Foushee * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Colin Allred via Blue Amp Action
subject: I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.
body:
My story
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50b47dd1-faba-4441-a303-73f1c4b1373d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2a5b213-e7e8-4df2-9d91-7ad5f374f85b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta91a010b-5ab0-49e0-9e5b-f8c58089ff6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6a6ddc0-8321-4d8b-9279-48a615103ff4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06f1fa50-f73b-411b-9867-b75bca4366dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House.[Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb4156b3-d169-4d0c-92d1-459f6b4f66b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. [**So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f9d1a0d-b564-4e73-a4c9-34d7770dec12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8b2a1e6-5765-40bf-94cd-b83b86771fe6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: How you can help me get a prime spot on the debate stage
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsoRHH3DN9

Vivek 2024

If we want to make the debate stage in August, we need to
secure unique donors to our grassroots campaign.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osoRHH3DN9

Fellow American -

I have a clear vision for how to
win the White House in 2024: a grassroots, bottom-up campaign
made of people just like you.

We're about to hit a major
campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of
campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking
under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this
movement.

So here's what I am asking of you
today: will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime
spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every
dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our
"Great Uprising."

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

Be a part of our movement, Fellow
American, by becoming our 35,000th donor!

Thank you,

Vivek Ramaswamy

JOIN THE MOVEMENT
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isoRHH3DN9

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osoRHH3DN9

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72158543660-echo3-A0CF420BB76B8166E7C7057F536A7C36@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

Peter,

My team and I are dedicated to running a completely people-powered campaign. This means we don’t accept any money from corporate PACs or special interest groups. Instead, we rely solely on grassroots contributions from folks like you.

[_**In fact, our average contribution is only $16.25.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564705/407264401/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230520-1-EM&amount=16.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDBlOTY4NDUtMzBmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cCnL632CeJMvxrpCH-sd0xPGkBHAakXX9TaOSVJtD9k=)

I’ve never taken a dollar from corporate PACs, and I never will. However, the same can’t be said for my Republican opponent, David Schweikert. Just like Schweikert, many of today’s career politicians are fueled by corporations and their dark money, ultimately becoming beholden to them instead of advocating for their constituents’ needs.

So, instead of becoming a puppet for corporations and special interests, I’m fully committed to the people in this district.

[_**Peter, can I count on you to match our average contribution of $16.25 or give whatever amount you can today to join our team of grassroots supporters?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63564708/407264404/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230520-1-EM&amount=16.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDBlOTY4NDUtMzBmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cCnL632CeJMvxrpCH-sd0xPGkBHAakXX9TaOSVJtD9k=)

name: Wisconsin Senate Update (via Tammy Baldwin for Senate)
subject: Not looking good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=313%2E35263%2EG6yr5L ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter —

Since Tammy launched her reelection campaign a month ago, several
potential GOP challengers have been waiting in the wings to challenge
Tammy’s seat. So, here’s a quick rundown of who we could end up with as
Wisconsin’s next Senator if we don’t reelect Tammy:

Tom Tiffany, who is one of the most right-wing members of Congress,
supports a nationwide abortion ban and propped up Donald Trump’s “Big Lie”
about the 2020 election being stolen.

We also have former House Speaker Paul Ryan, who did everything in his
power to repeal the Affordable Care Act. He supported cuts to Social
Security and Medicare too.

Another MAGA loyalist eyeing Tammy’s Senate seat is Sheriff David Clarke
Jr., whose ideologies are so extreme, he was banned from Fox News. This
guy is also a firm defender of the January 6 insurrection, going so far as
to encourage participants to not cooperate with federal authorities.

Rebecca Kleefisch is one more candidate who said the 2020 election was
“rigged.” She not only supports jail time for abortion providers, but also
has said that “same-sex marriage is a slippery slope that could lead to
people “marry[ing] dogs.”

Finally, MAGA millionaire Eric Hovde, who spends an awful lot of time in
his million-dollar waterfront house in California, could run for office in
Wisconsin and fund his campaign from personal wealth. He’s cut checks for
Donald Trump and won’t have any issue cutting checks for himself too.

Peter, any one of
these potential candidates is a terrifying prospect. But the unfortunate
reality is that regardless of who the GOP chooses as their candidate, they
will have millions of dollars from dark money donors ready to spend
whatever it takes to take Tammy’s Senate Seat.

That’s why we need to prepare for anything they throw our way. We can’t
let any of these extremists represent Wisconsinites and their values in
the Senate. That’s why today we’re reaching out to ask:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230520_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=313%2E35263%2EG6yr5L ]Can you rush a donation of any amount today, to help power our campaign
and reelect Tammy next November? With your help, we won’t let any of these
Republican extremists take over our Senate seat.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Peter — Since Tammy launched her reelection campaign a month ago, several potential GOP challengers have been waiting in the wings to challenge Tammy’s seat. So, here’s a quick rundown of who we could end up with as Wisconsin’s next Senator if we don’t reelect Tammy: Tom Tiffany, who is one of the most right-wing members of Congress, supports a nationwide abortion ban and propped up Donald Trump’s “Big Lie” about the 2020 election being stolen. We also have former House Speaker Paul Ryan, who did everything in his power to repeal the Affordable Care Act. He supported cuts to Social Security and Medicare too. Another MAGA loyalist eyeing Tammy’s Senate seat is Sheriff David Clarke Jr., whose ideologies are so extreme, he was banned from Fox News. This guy is also a firm defender of the January 6 insurrection, going so far as to encourage participants to not cooperate with federal authorities. Rebecca Kleefisch is one more candidate who said the 2020 election was “rigged.” She not only supports jail time for abortion providers, but also has said that “same-sex marriage is a slippery slope that could lead to people “marry[ing] dogs.” Finally, MAGA millionaire Eric Hovde, who spends an awful lot of time in his million-dollar waterfront house in California, could run for office in Wisconsin and fund his campaign from personal wealth. He’s cut checks for Donald Trump and won’t have any issue cutting checks for himself too. Peter, any one of these potential candidates is a terrifying prospect. But the unfortunate reality is that regardless of who the GOP chooses as their candidate, they will have millions of dollars from dark money donors ready to spend whatever it takes to take Tammy’s Senate Seat. That’s why we need to prepare for anything they throw our way. We can’t let any of these extremists represent Wisconsinites and their values in the Senate. That’s why today we’re reaching out to ask: [ ]Can you rush a donation of any amount today, to help power our campaign and reelect Tammy next November? With your help, we won’t let any of these Republican extremists take over our Senate seat. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]CHIP IN $5 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $25 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $50 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thanks for everything, Team Baldwin P.O. name: Finance Team (via Team Cori)
subject: This may surprise you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Running a grassroots campaign isn’t easy.
#
Peter,
This may surprise you, but did you know only 16 percent of the folks who receive our emails will actually open them? Moreover, only 2 percent will click on one of our links to sign a petition or power our grassroots campaign through a donation.
Running a grassroots campaign isn’t easy. Unlike most of Congress, Cori won't be bought by corporate PACs, lobbyists, or special interests.
Cori came to Congress to represent and fight on behalf of working everyday people. Because Team Cori doesn’t accept corporate handouts, we rely on grassroots contributions from emails like this one to keep Cori in Congress fighting for us and not worrying about fundraising.
We’ve made a lot of progress in these past few years, but we have miles to go to see the bold transformative policies our communities need to answer the pressing issues facing them.
The far-right GOP is looking to reverse all of the hard-fought progress we’ve made and we can’t let them win, Peter. [**And that’s why we’re asking: Can you join the top group of Cori’s supporters by chipping in $5 or whatever you can afford today to keep her in Congress fighting for us?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230520.0Eb0E5&amount=5&refcode=em20230520-2730&t=1&akid=2730%2E1082990%2ELP2Mrz)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230520.0Eb0E5&refcode=em20230520-2730&t=20&akid=2730%2E1082990%2ELP2Mrz)**
Thank you for being a part of our movement.
— Finance Team, Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230520-2730-footer&t=21&refcode2=2730_1082990_LP2Mrz&akid=2730%2E1082990%2ELP2Mrz) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: You might be surprised by this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Let us explain.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=66%2E552475%2EAvl1dE)
Peter, at the start of a campaign, early support makes all the difference:
The #1 way to support our campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s Senate seat is by **[starting a small, recurring monthly donation of even just $3.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230520-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20230520-1&refcode2=66_552475_Avl1dE&akid=66%2E552475%2EAvl1dE)**
**[Yes, I'll chip in monthly ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230520-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20230520-1&refcode2=66_552475_Avl1dE&akid=66%2E552475%2EAvl1dE)**
Let us explain, and we apologize if this gets a little nerdy:
Our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey runs on a budget. Unlike one-time donations, **monthly donations ensure we have support month after month** , and that allows us to plan how we will make investments in turning out voters well in advance.
Therefore, monthly donations will make a big impact on how much we are able to organize, advertise, and get around to talk with voters across Pennsylvania — and ultimately give us the support we’ll need to defend this seat and the Senate from the GOP.
The stakes couldn’t be higher in Pennsylvania — and today, you can help ensure we win this competitive Senate battleground race by starting a recurring contribution.
**[Will you start a monthly contribution to our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey? Even a few dollars each month will help build a powerful campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230520-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20230520-1&refcode2=66_552475_Avl1dE&akid=66%2E552475%2EAvl1dE)**
**[Yes, I'll chip in monthly ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230520-1?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=em20230520-1&refcode2=66_552475_Avl1dE&akid=66%2E552475%2EAvl1dE)**
**[Not today, but I’ll make a one-time donation ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230520-1?refcode=em20230520-1&refcode2=66_552475_Avl1dE&akid=66%2E552475%2EAvl1dE)**
Thank you,
Team Casey

* * *

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: this is how I was raised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it's Kirsten. Since I started a life of public service, I've been focused on achieving progress for families everywhere — and I've been looking ahead to the future. But there would be no future without a past, so I want to take a moment to share my family's story and tell you why I'm in this fight.
I grew up in Albany, New York. Back then, it was still uncommon for a mother to have a career of her own. But my mom was a lawyer — _one of just three women in her law school's graduating class._ And my grandmother, Polly, was a political powerhouse in her own right, fiercely committed to Democratic campaigning and organizing.
**These strong, independent women raised me to believe in myself, to be bold and to always fight for my community.** When I was making the decision to run for Congress, they were the first people to believe in me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63566511/407270929/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4156-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg3ZGNhOC0zNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fiGaQFNBYauJsiXK5CTvlYFYkvYdlWblSyVVbGM9u0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63566512/407270930/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4156-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg3ZGNhOC0zNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fiGaQFNBYauJsiXK5CTvlYFYkvYdlWblSyVVbGM9u0=)
That first campaign wasn't easy — Republicans outnumbered Democrats two to one in my district. But I knew my community, and my grandmother raised me on the bread and butter of campaigning. **I was confident that if I ran an honest campaign that spoke to the issues families really cared about, I could flip this district blue.**
I ran on bringing transparency to Washington, on ethics reform, on ending the Iraq War, and making health care affordable and accessible for all. I knocked countless doors, made endless phone calls and put in the elbow grease it takes to win these tough races. And when the polls closed, we came out on top. After I was sworn into office, I got to work delivering on the promises I made to voters. And two years later, I won reelection by 25 points.
As New York Democrats head into a critical election year in 2024, I'm leaning on those same lessons again. **You see, last year, we lost four congressional seats to GOP challengers — enough to give Republicans control of the House._And now the GOP is targeting my seat to flip the Senate, too._**
As the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket this year, I'm working overtime to retake these House seats and defend my seat to keep our Senate majority. **But on that very first campaign, I learned that you can't do anything alone.** **[_That's why I'm asking: Please, will you make a donation today to help me defend my seat, save our Senate majority and lead New York to a bright future? I'm counting on grassroots people like you to stand with me in this fight, friend._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63566513/407270931/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4156-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg3ZGNhOC0zNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fiGaQFNBYauJsiXK5CTvlYFYkvYdlWblSyVVbGM9u0=)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63566518/407270936/1575385346?refcode=jtk4156-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg3ZGNhOC0zNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fiGaQFNBYauJsiXK5CTvlYFYkvYdlWblSyVVbGM9u0=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63566519/407270937/1575385346?refcode=jtk4156-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg3ZGNhOC0zNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fiGaQFNBYauJsiXK5CTvlYFYkvYdlWblSyVVbGM9u0=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63566520/407270938/1575385346?refcode=jtk4156-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg3ZGNhOC0zNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fiGaQFNBYauJsiXK5CTvlYFYkvYdlWblSyVVbGM9u0=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Calling somebody a white supremacist isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word”
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:
In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.
**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.
This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.
[**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Justice Democrats and my campaign today?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134528?refcode=em20230520-29042&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=29042%2E1203867%2E-JhKxH)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134528?refcode=em20230520-29042&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=29042%2E1203867%2E-JhKxH)**
Thank you for being on our side in this fight.
Peace and love,
Jamaal Bowman
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=21&akid=29042%2E1203867%2E-JhKxH) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=22&akid=29042%2E1203867%2E-JhKxH) and your state public health department.
---

clean_body: Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear: In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me. Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.” Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw. This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change. Thank you for being on our side in this fight. Peace and love, Jamaal Bowman Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Read on to learn what President Biden has been up to, how Democrats are fighting back against MAGA Republicans, and how you can play an important role in the Biden-Harris reelection campaign. | | |
---
Peter, it’s been less than a month since President Biden and Vice President Harris announced their reelection campaign, and we couldn’t be more excited about how transformational their leadership of our country has been. Right now, our unemployment rate matches the low that was previously set in 1969. That’s right, Peter. _This is the lowest the unemployment rate has been for over 50 years._ For context: 1969 was the year Neil Armstrong walked on the moon and Sesame Street aired for the first time. It’s clearer than ever that President Biden is making history and improving this nation for working folks every single day. **Read on to learn what else the President and Vice President have been up to, how Democrats are pushing back against extreme MAGA Republicans, and how you can play an important role in the Biden-Harris reelection campaign.**

* * *
**GRADUATION SEASON (FEATURING PRESIDENT BIDEN)** Across the country, families and friends are coming together to celebrate the graduates in their lives. Howard University’s graduating class not only got to celebrate their graduates, but also hear from a very special guest: President Joe Biden! President Biden delivered remarks on his optimism for the Class of 2023. For more of the president’s speech, click below to watch a short clip.

* * *
**WHAT REPUBLICANS HAVE BEEN UP TO (HINT: IT’S NOT GREAT)**
While President Biden has been busy working hard to grow the economy, create jobs, and work with Democrats at all levels of government to improve the lives of American workers and families, the Republicans have been....well, you’ll see.
Recently, 217 House Republicans voted for a bill that could:
* Cut education funding;
* Send manufacturing jobs overseas;
* Cut Meals on Wheels;
* And take health care away from millions of Americans.

These Republicans are claiming that Democrats are not delivering for the American people. Yet, they’re the ones working overtime to take essential services and resources away from us.
The math isn’t adding up, Peter -- and we need to hold Republicans accountable.

clean_body: Read on to learn what President Biden has been up to, how Democrats are fighting back against MAGA Republicans, and how you can play an important role in the Biden-Harris reelection campaign. | | | Peter, it’s been less than a month since President Biden and Vice President Harris announced their reelection campaign, and we couldn’t be more excited about how transformational their leadership of our country has been. Right now, our unemployment rate matches the low that was previously set in 1969. That’s right, Peter. This is the lowest the unemployment rate has been for over 50 years. For context: 1969 was the year Neil Armstrong walked on the moon and Sesame Street aired for the first time. It’s clearer than ever that President Biden is making history and improving this nation for working folks every single day. Read on to learn what else the President and Vice President have been up to, how Democrats are pushing back against extreme MAGA Republicans, and how you can play an important role in the Biden-Harris reelection campaign. GRADUATION SEASON (FEATURING PRESIDENT BIDEN) Across the country, families and friends are coming together to celebrate the graduates in their lives. Howard University’s graduating class not only got to celebrate their graduates, but also hear from a very special guest: President Joe Biden! President Biden delivered remarks on his optimism for the Class of 2023. For more of the president’s speech, click below to watch a short clip. | | | WHAT REPUBLICANS HAVE BEEN UP TO (HINT: IT’S NOT GREAT) While President Biden has been busy working hard to grow the economy, create jobs, and work with Democrats at all levels of government to improve the lives of American workers and families, the Republicans have been....well, you’ll see. Recently, 217 House Republicans voted for a bill that could: Cut education funding; Send manufacturing jobs overseas; Cut Meals on Wheels; And take health care away from millions of Americans. These Republicans are claiming that Democrats are not delivering for the American people. Yet, they’re the ones working overtime to take essential services and resources away from us. The math isn’t adding up, Peter -- and we need to hold Republicans accountable. To help send a powerful message highlighting just how dangerous MAGA Republicans are for this nation, head over to , and you’ll find some graphics you can share. Take a look at some of our favorites below. [NEW MERCH ALERT] EXCLUSIVE PRIDE MERCH 🌈 Still looking for the best outfit for your Pride Month celebrations? Well, it’s a good thing you opened today’s Team Joe Newsletter! The Official Biden-Harris store just released new Pride Merch designs, and we want you to be one of the first to get your hands on them. | | NOW IS THE TIME If you’ve been mulling over how you can play an important role in the Biden-Harris reelection campaign, now is your time to take action. A grassroots donation from you today will not only help reelect President Biden, but elect thousands of Democrats in communities across the country. It is never too early to get involved. In fact, an investment of $25 from you right now will ensure we have the resources we’ll need ahead of 2024 to take back the House and keep the White House and Senate. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Talk soon, Team Joe | ---|--- | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, ** Paid for by Biden for President.

They will NOT win elections – and the sooner we understand that, the better chance we have of coming together to restore America. clean_body: At Working Families Party we don’t just live our values... we also wear them. | | | Pack up your coats and mittens, Peter — summer’s almost here, and so are your new Working Families ‘fits! | | ---|--- Summer nights can get cool — but you’ll look even cooler in our bomber jacket | Show off your style with a WFP tank top | Grab a WFP baseball jersey for a home run of a look | Howl at the moon (or your least favorite senator) with a new wolf tee In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know.

subject: What matters most to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUILD ALASKA'S FUTURE ACTION FUND
body:
The last election proved the impact we can all have when we work together toward our common goals.

| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63567384/407273505/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230518_priorities&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjllOWIyNC0zOGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2w6E0j4Qacwvx2CkcJHA-02KbkYIM3rL7SX0DKLgb8=&emci=2f56cab6-c8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0f9e9b24-38f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)

| | | Friend, Now that we’re well into 2023, we at Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund are reaching out to ask you about your priorities for the current political cycle. [**Take the quick 30-second survey by checking the issues most important to you →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63567385/407273506/-841595398?utm_campaign=em_230518_priorities&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjllOWIyNC0zOGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2w6E0j4Qacwvx2CkcJHA-02KbkYIM3rL7SX0DKLgb8=&emci=2f56cab6-c8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0f9e9b24-38f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) _Why is your input important to us?_ Our work in 2022 to stave off Sarah Palin and other extreme candidates showed how powerful we can be when we all work together. Our team was proud to play an important role in electing the first Indigenous representative from the state of Alaska — Mary Peltola! **Thank you for your support during the last election cycle. By helping Alaska, you helped keep our nation’s democracy intact — one state at a time! ** _**Our mission is far from over.**_ Republican extremism still poses a significant threat — Sarah Palin is back leading the charge to end ranked choice voting and Republican money is already flowing to Alaska to try to defeat Representative Peltola. **We can’t let up the gas on countering these extremists with facts.** We’re redoubling our efforts to educate the public about the benefits of the Biden Administration’s investments in broadband, green infrastructure, sustainable development, Indigenous rights and protecting women’s reproductive rights. **We’re showing Alaskans that people like President Biden and Representative Peltola are fighting to build them a better future.** [**So please, friend — take 30 seconds to answer our quick survey so we can ensure that our messaging is on point!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63567386/407273507/-841595398?utm_campaign=em_230518_priorities&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjllOWIyNC0zOGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2w6E0j4Qacwvx2CkcJHA-02KbkYIM3rL7SX0DKLgb8=&emci=2f56cab6-c8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0f9e9b24-38f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) **What is most important to you in 2023-2024?** | [OPPOSING EXTREMISM](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63567387/407273508/-841595398?utm_campaign=em_230518_priorities&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjllOWIyNC0zOGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2w6E0j4Qacwvx2CkcJHA-02KbkYIM3rL7SX0DKLgb8=&emci=2f56cab6-c8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0f9e9b24-38f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)

clean_body: The last election proved the impact we can all have when we work together toward our common goals. | | | | | | Friend, Now that we’re well into 2023, we at Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund are reaching out to ask you about your priorities for the current political cycle. Why is your input important to us? Our work in 2022 to stave off Sarah Palin and other extreme candidates showed how powerful we can be when we all work together. Our team was proud to play an important role in electing the first Indigenous representative from the state of Alaska — Mary Peltola! Thank you for your support during the last election cycle. By helping Alaska, you helped keep our nation’s democracy intact — one state at a time! Our mission is far from over. Republican extremism still poses a significant threat — Sarah Palin is back leading the charge to end ranked choice voting and Republican money is already flowing to Alaska to try to defeat Representative Peltola. We can’t let up the gas on countering these extremists with facts. We’re redoubling our efforts to educate the public about the benefits of the Biden Administration’s investments in broadband, green infrastructure, sustainable development, Indigenous rights and protecting women’s reproductive rights. We’re showing Alaskans that people like President Biden and Representative Peltola are fighting to build them a better future. What is most important to you in 2023-2024? | Thank you for your input, and ongoing support! – Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund | | Help us continue to build Alaska's future by to support our work. | | | Copyright © 2022 Build Alaska's Future Action Fund, All rights reserved. Fellow Conservative,

I came to Winston Salem North Carolina 32 years ago with a few bucks to my name and the hope for better days ahead. Through God’s blessing and my wife Kelly’s support, I was blessed to be a pastor for sixteen years. _So, I know firsthand the despair that haunts so many._

But just like when I was a struggling young man, I have hope that there are **better days ahead**. And today, I’m proud to act on that hope and pave the path forward for all North Carolinians.

**My name is Mark Walker, and I’m honored to announce I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of North Carolina.** [**Today, we take the next step toward preserving American greatness and building a stronger state, one community at a time.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy4VasdKes-nsFc7QuVYHTz5kh9bfuBt3rhnnsVzo3ie5VonfH_7J_fsWjT8d5njOZmMcXXkzjX8h0RjyW_3MRIh2kmsSVAo_JxvyrYVXauqnoyBqEQl5h_NbRjvWeAS8PmelcTdAhK5V5A9v-ZJTaWb)

[** LEARN MORE ABOUT MARK WALKER **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy5GNmibr6pMKEMMoRaFv4e-xas8zgPOnSPES8VJ0ismXpCNYN8mNFFT42J2XwB1RAX7oeRnWNag7rBvJ7MS0-a2Zxg_zAKirXuHjDair68-qQKIXj1WzlhQUv_XHlUs7kw54a2BRglsABsPvfO_xBFA)

[**Fellow Conservative, it has never been clearer:_we cannot continue to operate under the failed policies of the Left and their outright attempt to ruin our state and our country._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy4JpVjV8TCsglWvypUVCeBWRCiBTCz0o3FMlcSZivB7kNc1ADZYePdfuseNcJLkuHAqk0JKavaLwcw26vaLqY-ftLKeNRV_YPc3qGhLUZIxeZDS8kAf2aiEMCHjzTWlJoBvG81q38ORCnOYx2eQxRbW)

[**I’m running for Governor**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy7SnnfS-48lmo1M5R0Cca2WMKtMEOcsqmHLWV4LDyPB7xoZfP1OW49NKC1itQQp9x86r8EcksI8pgjVERQQcMcbFTtYW1aOkjnZ8tzjzNsT8xYtObdQTyY45yuaULuiOClyCPRH5j1IOhZ3rkUXsV9r) to secure economic freedom in North Carolina. We can’t go on as a country facing crippling inflation, soaring taxes, and a constant hamster wheel of government handouts. We must make investments to recruit manufacturers for long-term job growth and build out critical infrastructure.

I’m running for Governor because someone needs to stand up for our children and remove DC bureaucracies from North Carolina classrooms! Every child is fearfully and wonderfully made by their Creator, and as a father myself I’m leading the fight to protect their precious minds from the diseased content Democrats are trying to teach them in school.

[** WATCH MARK WALKER’S VIDEO **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy5PiQchgC06NbEU-q4-CjdZyu6N680USY3UBrnaLA0WFCcPZZ-Cv-VCXdKtY1-pfUoEK_sL9omM0AT4heNm-JF--bi6PWmFPmcomw-SJ6xPx1S2LCuXHlxGm9UxsNiASGpc47aWhdtGi_NaSwmgg4QC)

**Fellow Conservative, we are in a battle for the heart and soul of our country – and as far as I’m concerned, that battle begins in North Carolina.**

**As long as I have the Lord's guidance and with Kelly next to me, I’ll take the fight to both the radicals and the political elites...** [**_but I need you with me._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy77gFtbZm5U7fHw7bwsJ6c18qJpQZAjQL6RrH_lSgLgXxJOys4Q2WmZGAQ8fxhBOrYEMnBROyXZ4WiudM4vXBvMVzpsDgshQBmKPP3f8ebMPrsCSfutUTDH3jjwOgKyaq7EIy0eIUfGdE0EZnsopIaX)

Let’s make North Carolina proud. Let’s build something together and let’s start today.

[**There are better days ahead – join me.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy4fDM6mWJhUe2jTA8xlob_9yxVSmXCqATTyYAcqTqMr6raAaHvUFO0JWyXBK3NZEyNa145PdtRI4PwdIwwMgVqxzisxvk6wvR7_xrY3q0ndKPzJPyOgBwHRAtjubSmH6iFg-5MoKU3bE1hTO4Xj5qGb)

[** SUPPORT MARK WALKER **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=54c04ed3ad644cd5bffbec8c8f53c2c2&_e=DrDKntc5uETjmAFBPIfwqOginlbde2WZiI2OMU-pvh7yx3O7cuW87L08YBsulhXmcYnI_D0y5meMuBnz_Er5MesFLmX5xjRK-_24rd6kfbZRGiauVimZ-QTslJ9DRpC7krIbfwtnIw8dQaS0HTxRcvCcRjNlQEGDluCYpOpcmUZdCO94JESc73gutSRjCbWBqAcg1ZPFjABeaW01mzLDBGVZuG5oInSgPdk5PHKyzy7iQS4s89SYwXxL18dywK2M77KR3fVSc0m3E-0j4mxupxmT-tsRJyDXqdh4m18LApx-8Xl9hjbtiTbLAigtrrPrdP9ei42r1nJAcRKaolgWn4XhluA85-ca8zqbO43q2fYdd375gfWkLW1W22JKmfDY)

For education, economic growith and public safety,

Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

body:
Friend — what’s happening in Washington right now is unacceptable.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63568348/407276712/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDhiYWQ4Yy0zOWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QeWNoassIQCwo2SSyvzLHoM-jxvuH0cmYQcC_8xAMEM=&emci=8e081a2c-5ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=748bad8c-39f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63568349/407276713/915037627?refcode=email_052023_crow&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDhiYWQ4Yy0zOWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QeWNoassIQCwo2SSyvzLHoM-jxvuH0cmYQcC_8xAMEM=)

Friend — what’s happening in Washington right now is unacceptable.

Threats to default and crash our economy. Playing politics with veterans’ health care. Proposed cuts to education and funding for teachers.

I ran for Congress because I was tired of politics as usual and politicians who put special interests above their constituents. If there’s ever been a time to put country over party, it’s right now.

Hardworking families don’t care about the latest fights. They care about putting food on the table. And paying for their groceries. And making sure their children are safe at school.

We need to get back on track before it’s too late.

Since my time as an Army Ranger, I’ve dedicated my career to servant leadership. I’ve channeled that into taking on the tough fights in Congress — including working alongside Brittany Pettersen to create more good-paying jobs, defending our constitutional freedoms, and passing lifesaving gun violence prevention legislation.

Dark money groups, the gun lobby, and countless others are going to try and turn back the clock on our progress. This fight is far too important to let them win.

[**Brittany Pettersen and I are working to solve our nation’s biggest problems head-on, and we need your help. Will you split a $25 donation between our campaigns now to help us take back the House majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63568355/407276714/915037627?refcode=email_052023_crow&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDhiYWQ4Yy0zOWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QeWNoassIQCwo2SSyvzLHoM-jxvuH0cmYQcC_8xAMEM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63568363/407276715/-1777122001?refcode=email_052023_crow&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDhiYWQ4Yy0zOWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QeWNoassIQCwo2SSyvzLHoM-jxvuH0cmYQcC_8xAMEM=)

clean_body: Friend — what’s happening in Washington right now is unacceptable. = Friend — what’s happening in Washington right now is unacceptable. Threats to default and crash our economy. Playing politics with veterans’ health care. Proposed cuts to education and funding for teachers. I ran for Congress because I was tired of politics as usual and politicians who put special interests above their constituents. If there’s ever been a time to put country over party, it’s right now. Hardworking families don’t care about the latest fights. They care about putting food on the table. And paying for their groceries. And making sure their children are safe at school. We need to get back on track before it’s too late. Since my time as an Army Ranger, I’ve dedicated my career to servant leadership. I’ve channeled that into taking on the tough fights in Congress — including working alongside Brittany Pettersen to create more good-paying jobs, defending our constitutional freedoms, and passing lifesaving gun violence prevention legislation. Dark money groups, the gun lobby, and countless others are going to try and turn back the clock on our progress. | | | Fellow American, Josh has been working hard defending your rights in the Senate, but as the race for 2024 starts to get underway, he needs your help.

You’ve been one of our most dedicated patriots, and you know what’s going on on the ground among grassroots conservatives.

Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

A flood of illegal immigrants is heading to a town near you!

clean_body: Since she was first elected in 2018 – flipping VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years – she’s been committed to delivering results for her constituents. | = | Peter, It’s Adam, Abigail’s husband. I know you haven’t heard from me in a while, but I wanted to reach out to talk through all the important work Abigail is taking up in Congress. = | = Since she was first elected in 2018 – flipping VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years – she’s been committed to delivering results for her constituents. Here are just a few ways our community has benefited from her advocacy in Congress: 💊 – Abigail helped cap the cost of life-saving insulin for seniors at $35 per month. 📡 – She made it possible to expand broadband internet access so that all Virginians have the high-speed connection they need. 🏥 – She’s working tirelessly to codify Roe v. Wade into law so reproductive rights are protected for all Americans. 📈 – She’s leading the charge to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks, and her bipartisan bill is gaining momentum every day. This is just a sampling of the important work Abigail is leading on in Congress, = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Adam Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. clean_body: Are you proud to be an American?... A new poll conducted by the Wall Street Journal shows a disturbing outcome...| | | | | Peter, We really need to know... Have you seen this? A new poll conducted by the Wall Street Journal shows a disturbing outcome: Peter, our country was built by PROUD American patriots like you who loved our country, god, and family. IF the results of the poll are accurate, it means we are LOSING our country FASTER than we even realize. With this disturbing news circulating, we had to make sure Republicans like yourself are still PROUD to be AMERICAN and a Republican for that matter. body:
Team,

There’s no way to mince words here — May has been a complete and utter MAGA sh*t show.

Republicans have managed to:

🏛️ Face legal accountability. On Tuesday, a New York jury ruled in favor of E. Jean Carroll in her case against MAGA ringleader Donald Trump.
🐦 Announce a “big” comeback... to Twitter. In a cryptic video posted to Twitter, insurrection antagonist and scorned former Fox News host Tucker Carlson said he’s launching a new show on what he dubs “the only remaining free speech outlet.”
️👮 Get arrested. On Wednesday, George Santos was indicted for 13 crimes including wire fraud, money laundering, lying to the House of Representatives, and stealing public funds.
📣 Call January 6th a “beautiful day.” In a CNN town hall, Trump doubled-down in his delusions of grandeur to the surprise of absolutely no one.

Friend, apparently Republican’s rock bottom has a basement. Trump, Tucker Carlson, and George Santos are continuing to lie to the American people — and it’s clear that facts just don’t matter to these MAGA lunatics.

We have to make sure to keep these extremists out of office in 2024 so they don’t have another opportunity to run Washington into the ground.

Friend, Eric will never stop fighting back against the GOP, Fox News extremists, and the deceptions they feed the American people. But he needs to know that you’re with him every step of the way in this battle. Chip in whatever you can today so Eric can keep fighting for what's right: the truth. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: NEWS via Sen. Rick Scott
subject: My service is not a publicity stunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, it's Sen. Rick Scott.
---
| | Serving in the Navy was one of the greatest honors of my life.

Our troops are the backbone of this country, and I commend the service of the men and women who put their lives on the line to defend America.

**That’s why when a far-Left op-ed accused me of wearing my Navy hat as a “publicity stunt” to lie to the people of Florida, I was absolutely disgusted. **

I don’t wear my Navy hat to “lie” to my constituents. I wear it because I’m proud to have had the opportunity to serve in the greatest fighting force in the world.

**Insulting someone’s service because of their political views is the lowest of the low, but _THIS is what the radical Left and the fake news have sunk down to._**

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: bumping this to the top of your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but this can't wait:

A few days ago, I reached out to this team of fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to PROTECT Social Security – and the initial response from this team was incredible.

Peter, clearly, protecting Social Security is an issue that resonates with a lot of folks – especially the 3.7 million New Yorkers who receive payments from the program every month. That's why I decided to re-open my petition to garner another 5,000 signatures to make sure our voices are heard loud and clear.

So please, before 11:59 p.m. tonight, will you take a second to sign my petition and urge Congress to protect Social Security? Here's the best link:

https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-social-security-0323?code=jtk1086-su-text&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F

TELL CONGRESS: PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY >>

Thank you for your help here.

Letitia James

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Letitia James
Date: Tues, Mar 21, 2023
Subject: This move would harm nearly 3.7 million New Yorkers

Social Security is a lifeline for MILLIONS.

That’s why I am asking you to add your name now to urge Congress to protect Social Security!

Add Your Name

https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-social-security-0323?code=jtk1086-su-text&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F

Peter, this is urgent: Extremist Republicans have announced a plan that would open Social Security up to SEVERE cuts – a move that would harm the nearly 67 million Americans who receive Social Security checks every month – including more than 3.7 million New Yorkers.

Here’s everything you need to know about the latest developments in our fight to protect Social Security:

FIRST, Republicans across the country began to put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block.

THEN, in a heated exchange during the State of the Union, President Biden got Republican lawmakers to agree NOT to touch Social Security benefits in the next round of budget cuts.

NOW, I’m calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to stay true to their word and protect Social Security.

I’ll be honest, Peter: I’ve seen Republican lawmakers go back on their word dozens of times. But, with nearly 3.7 MILLION New Yorkers currently depending on Social Security benefits, we CANNOT let them go back on their word.

This isn’t about politics. This is about real people who could fall into poverty if Republicans gut Social Security. So I have to ask: Will you sign my petition now to urge Congress to protect Social Security? I need to collect 5,000 signatures before 11:59 p.m. tonight.

SIGN THE PETITION

https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-social-security-0323?code=jtk1086-su-text&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-social-security-0323%3F

Thank you for standing with me.

Letitia

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=pBm8bHi7HgmhUG43aFmIFgavK1wzMMe3k0%2FElBBM7v%2F82PoEZebDcuvKTntbbJOLJYwjWHVRUSZyEPl2o03QKSJGCGU6y2U59U%2FAxIBdE9nPunmapPRbppNxRX6vwcUzm0Dp0AmgzZYRAbiVG7JWN0AyQ%2FdDNnrSO0DvayVS6Dw5%2FNLa4aMhZ0xFDoefV6aimJpQQnaoUXnb6xVVY1ovERfXQyKBtNfNlf5A4uJsG2Qnv12I4lSVjRbqlnUqsaTGYzRuMmrSJpm6J5edicXXgBz7MHM81nI7AU5DeCnu1ZJ9qR15N82NJ2eqKE1gQcD5H73IGWVwwQkdwjtaNaKpBcxsZ%2BpwvPortc%2BH1sBoxCaxu2Ax54TCC1Q9fJpU9w1MfxzqZDLouVaOqf2f9g9lnZ9zXQTqV6gWgLQ3vVyYGCuowLbktxTeEWW2w2AAUFUY]
