body:
My name is Mark Walker, and I’m honored to announce I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of North Carolina. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=81497f2a2b354aaeb3e824200d4f3fc8&_t=g7FHaFKMnW2uQ0k6qm98pYEfe-E43la_Kp9CFvMRPQL7WNR7FFfPEKFdzTYJsrVamV2XT4cKNDzG1ocXY385MZqtc-M4N0J_lANyvIO-ReE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=81497f2a2b354aaeb3e824200d4f3fc8&_t=g7FHaFKMnW2uQ0k6qm98pYEfe-E43la_Kp9CFvMRPQL7WNR7FFfPEKFdzTYJsrVamV2XT4cKNDzG1ocXY385MZqtc-M4N0J_lANyvIO-ReE%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=81497f2a2b354aaeb3e824200d4f3fc8&_e=q-XEdDBZWA5IK2o7yxfDrjm3vu8oZib2g_wjx3UFh7W0GuSzhMTeX0n7RiP0sXb9VX0up9dOqK-7jT5SxnfyUb3RgdRK99um6yyhEEiLBvd--1HIcYyLq7eHUtMVwXlEkygRpw6wsk2U_AetdrxbFudTXQwZ3i9p0ZZeQlkBBAmMp4yE1pGj5LVXRaxWjMdcceO2kcYYgHRm8spZdVpF4d2YOEW35u4sbJvbhF0aS7AbhN9Vxu89zvZ-OFmCZ4iS9zl9pBx72r1bYft9GvadJwQTYZ1fxb7oMu3iHp-ncYUB1lMekPsY3DogLH3ky_tDdDt2raw0-Vpknm0Eduh2hcAF_fD4RMCDpAG-avn1v-IPRj9y_-ByiM1KTpH-FdwQ)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I came to Winston Salem North Carolina 32 years ago with a few bucks to my name and the hope for better days ahead. Through God’s blessing and my wife Kelly’s support, I was blessed to be a pastor for sixteen years. _So, I know firsthand the despair that haunts so many._

But just like when I was a struggling young man, I have hope that there are **better days ahead**. And today, I’m proud to act on that hope and pave the path forward for all North Carolinians.

**My name is Mark Walker, and I’m honored to announce I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of North Carolina.** [**Today, we take the next step toward preserving American greatness and building a stronger state, one community at a time.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=81497f2a2b354aaeb3e824200d4f3fc8&_e=q-XEdDBZWA5IK2o7yxfDrjm3vu8oZib2g_wjx3UFh7W0GuSzhMTeX0n7RiP0sXb9VX0up9dOqK-7jT5SxnfyUb3RgdRK99um6yyhEEiLBvd--1HIcYyLq7eHUtMVwXlEkygRpw6wsk2U_AetdrxbFudTXQwZ3i9p0ZZeQlkBBAmMp4yE1pGj5LVXRaxWjMdcceO2kcYYgHRm8spZdVpF4d2YOEW35u4sbJvbhF0aS7BK5pLKwsQvrBHzvp1GJJDjnHxeLagvUGfpcCzWRfVWkqbOcmidNuEWRNPuns8FOI9PlpUibTI4LD84C9NCdB7tYjocLpXdgmsU55hNEIg3pqImyj_ua8iq11vwqQlaoVC652fuvShr6eG1fuz-HOAB)

For education, economic growith and public safety,

Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

subject: Children shouldn’t have to fear gun violence

body:
As a mom and pediatrician, Kim knows how important it is to take action on common sense gun safety, Peter. As a mom and pediatrician, Kim knows how important it is to take action on common sense gun safety, Peter.

That's why she's working to combat the gun violence epidemic by passing a federal Assault Weapons Ban to keep dangerous, military-style weapons of war off our streets.

**[If you agree it's time to reinstate a federal Assault Weapons Ban, add your name today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63571665/407287549/-628744091?ms=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=XS41xK4WcSMXJYAPARG5xEsp31tSN2yxGB0nDHG7PhprXFQK0wG0AOEZD7SNCFz7r/ipYlWACsgocdob2XYKkUPdX2tamH+mXgal08gGf5rlrTbjC1M9bHTcPybEoSnrFE5VRBu4yHaCGO19nwknJYsx9oDSQeF+RiiKET9X22I=&refcode2=a12dade6-48f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJkYWRlNi00OGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZuZwaxJR2jEurjlpGMa3ie7ePt36Z-QSDXZqQFFdflI=&emci=3f8f1c94-a8f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a12dade6-48f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dr. Kim Schrier <info@drkimschrier.com>
Date: Thurs, May 18, 2023
Subject: There's no place for these weapons of war in our communities. Peter,

From Yakima, Washington, to Allen, Texas, over 15,671 Americans have already lost their lives this year due to an act of gun violence – including 658 children.

**Enough is enough. Parents shouldn't have to worry about guns in schools, and their children shouldn't have to fear for their lives.**

As a mom, like many parents, I trust that my son will be safe when he goes to school. But we know that nowhere is really safe in a country that allows guns to get into the hands of people who would do others harm.

That's why I've been fighting to pass common sense measures to reduce gun violence in Congress.

Last year, I was proud to help pass the bipartisan Safer Communities Act to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks. But we still have more work ahead of us – and that includes banning assault weapons federally. A quarter of the guns sold in the US today are assault rifles. That is terrifying.

I voted for an Assault Weapons Ban last year because there's no place for these weapons of war in our communities. While this bill was held up in the Senate, we need to keep working to implement this common sense reform.

**[We need to take action to protect our communities from preventable gun violence. If you agree, join me in calling for a federal Assault Weapons Ban today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63571666/407287550/-628744091?ms=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=XS41xK4WcSMXJYAPARG5xEsp31tSN2yxGB0nDHG7PhprXFQK0wG0AOEZD7SNCFz7r/ipYlWACsgocdob2XYKkUPdX2tamH+mXgal08gGf5rlrTbjC1M9bHTcPybEoSnrFE5VRBu4yHaCGO19nwknJYsx9oDSQeF+RiiKET9X22I=&refcode2=a12dade6-48f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJkYWRlNi00OGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZuZwaxJR2jEurjlpGMa3ie7ePt36Z-QSDXZqQFFdflI=&emci=3f8f1c94-a8f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a12dade6-48f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63571667/407287552/-628744091?ms=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230519_Gun Re_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=XS41xK4WcSMXJYAPARG5xEsp31tSN2yxGB0nDHG7PhprXFQK0wG0AOEZD7SNCFz7r/ipYlWACsgocdob2XYKkUPdX2tamH+mXgal08gGf5rlrTbjC1M9bHTcPybEoSnrFE5VRBu4yHaCGO19nwknJYsx9oDSQeF+RiiKET9X22I=&refcode2=a12dade6-48f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJkYWRlNi00OGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZuZwaxJR2jEurjlpGMa3ie7ePt36Z-QSDXZqQFFdflI=&emci=3f8f1c94-a8f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a12dade6-48f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

As a mom and pediatrician, Kim knows how important it is to take action on common sense gun safety, Peter. That's why she's working to combat the gun violence epidemic by passing a federal Assault Weapons Ban to keep dangerous, military-style weapons of war off our streets. Peter, From Yakima, Washington, to Allen, Texas, over 15,671 Americans have already lost their lives this year due to an act of gun violence – including 658 children. Enough is enough. Parents shouldn't have to worry about guns in schools, and their children shouldn't have to fear for their lives. As a mom, like many parents, I trust that my son will be safe when he goes to school. But we know that nowhere is really safe in a country that allows guns to get into the hands of people who would do others harm. That's why I've been fighting to pass common sense measures to reduce gun violence in Congress. Last year, I was proud to help pass the bipartisan Safer Communities Act to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks. But we still have more work ahead of us – and that includes banning assault weapons federally. A quarter of the guns sold in the US today are assault rifles. That is terrifying. I voted for an Assault Weapons Ban last year because there's no place for these weapons of war in our communities. While this bill was held up in the Senate, we need to keep working to implement this common sense reform. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: A June 20th primary could decide if Glenn Youngkin has the votes to ban abortion in Virginia next year.
body:
Protect abortion in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97980a78-e90f-44d5-8115-d5ca9ed27ee2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We need to stop Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin's sick, right-wing agenda RIGHT NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf827318e-220a-4fb1-8952-757d8710cbac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Youngkin just released a one-minute ad to announce his intention to run for President. It's great stuff, ya know, if you can get past how he fawns over Ronald Reagan, a man who's been dead nearly 20 years and not President since 1989 (pssst, you've had 3 GOP Presidents since, the most recent guy's name rhymes with "rump"), and the fact he quotes Reagan on standing up to Russia, while his party has lined up at Vladimir Putin's bedside._ **_THE KEY_ :_Youngkin's pushing a crazy right-wing agenda in a state he tricked into thinking he was a moderate. We certainly can't let any Dems enable Youngkin, as he goes full authoritarian on abortion. Yet, a Democrat, Joe Morissey, who was twice disbarred as state prosecutor and charged with "delinquincy of a minor" for a relationship with a seventeen year old receptionist at his law firm, is supporting Youngkin._** **Morissey's the only "pro-life" (read: anti-choice) Democratic state senator who supports Youngkin's anti-abortion bill. In addition to Youngkin, Republicans control the state house and we only have a one-seat, pro-choice margin in the state house, at risk in November. ****But we can fix it. ****June 20th, Virginia has its primaries, and we have an outstanding Democratic candidate challenging Morissey, former State Delegate Lashrecse Aird. ** **This AP piece describes how just about every elected Democrat in VA is supporting Aird:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82579b78-5d47-47c9-8ca0-85303fdb63aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**We don't know how the November general election will go, we could lose pro-choice seats, and we only have that one seat margin.**_ **_So why not double that margin, one month from today, to a 2 vote pro-choice VA State Senate majority, by removing so-called Democrat Morrissey and replacing him with Aird? She's made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign with a "Roe Not Joe" tour around the district._** **_Youngkin's greedy for power, so he'll fight harder for a profane, full abortion ban in Virginia to boost his presidential run. Yet, he can't do it without the votes. _** [**_Again, the primary is June 20th, but early voting has already begun! __Will you join Blue Amp's "Roe Not Joe," effort by supporting former Delegate Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect abortion in Virginia and the country from Youngkin?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61c30d30-1f97-41c7-8dba-492730c67da3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We must stop anti-abortion extremists, be they "Democrats" like Morrissey or Republicans like Youngkin._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87bd8763-9283-476d-925e-c5e69fa4d0d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Ted Cruz's offensive Twitter joke
disclaimer_text: paid for by The Real Texas PAC
body:
We don't find this funny. Do you? | | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63571764/407288286/-1240381122?refcode=051622&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4OTE5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZTExNzQwLTQ5ZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vWNQIoyTD1q_dqpV_nPZBa-H-JKAoip9gTSHnZtKy38=)
---
When Texas was enduring the worst winter storm in decades and millions were without power, Ted Cruz hopped on a plane and fled to Cancun. **Now, he's tweeting jokes about it: **
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63571765/407288287/-1240381122?refcode=051622&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4OTE5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1ZTExNzQwLTQ5ZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vWNQIoyTD1q_dqpV_nPZBa-H-JKAoip9gTSHnZtKy38=)
---

name: Sherrod Brown for Ohio
subject: we're concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
We'll be honest, friend, we're concerned.
**First,** _Politico_ reported that our Democratic Senate majority could hinge on winning in Ohio.
**Then, **multiple outlets, from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _CNN_ ranked Sherrod as one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot.
**Now, experts at _NBC News_ say this race is sure to be one of the "nastiest and most expensive in the country" – right as we're falling short of our critical $10,000 fundraising goal!**
**A country club Republican just joined this race and our crucial deadline is fast approaching fast, so we're counting on your help to close the gap and protect Sherrod's must-win seat before it's too late. Friend, we can prove the pundits wrong, win in Ohio, and defend the Senate – but only with your grassroots support:**

Our movement for fair maps helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” And last November, we helped elect Democracy Defenders in key states across the country, and we helped defeat dangerous election deniers.

But now, Republicans are seeking to secure unearned power by:
* Manipulating maps and suppressing voting rights ahead of the 2024 election
* Attempting to stack state courts with judges who they believe will enable their anti-democratic schemes
* Asking courts to roll back decisions upholding fair maps and protecting voting rights
* Advancing a fringe legal theory that would give GOP legislatures unchecked power over federal elections

clean_body: | Team, Attorney General Eric Holder had good news and bad news about our fight for fair maps and a strong democracy: | = = Our movement for fair maps helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” And last November, we helped elect Democracy Defenders in key states across the country, and we helped defeat dangerous election deniers. But now, Republicans are seeking to secure unearned power by: Manipulating maps and suppressing voting rights ahead of the 2024 election Attempting to stack state courts with judges who they believe will enable their anti-democratic schemes Asking courts to roll back decisions upholding fair maps and protecting voting rights Advancing a fringe legal theory that would give GOP legislatures unchecked power over federal elections ...and more But we must remember that we are not powerless against the GOP’s efforts to undermine our democracy. That’s why A.G. Holder also said “We can and we are fighting back against cynical, partisan tactics like these. . . We need supporters like you to help us keep up the fight for fairness.” The NDRC counts on this grassroots team to power our democracy-saving work. We know not everyone can give every time we ask, but if even just one out of every four people reading this message pitches in, it will go a long way. Please, team: Will you be that one person? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Marshall for Congress
subject: Join us and SIGN ON to show solidarity with striking writers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
**Striking writers deserve their fair share!**

[**Join us and stand in solidarity with striking TV writers. Tell media company CEO's to support their demands and end the strike!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63572510/407292038/1045005911?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230519_06%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNmODBjOC00ZWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1woX478v08nU-mdInkh15EuOMh2JbUW2EG5vDi3pwk=&emci=9df61cf9-6ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ebcf80c8-4ef7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
With the advent of streaming services, the business model for the TV industry has changed such that writers are no longer receiving consistent and fair residuals, which make up a substantial part of their income. It has become an existential crisis.

The Writers’ Guild of America is on strike to save the livelihood of its writers battling wanton corporate greed. The strike not only puts writers in a tenuous position, it cascades down to others who work in the entertainment industry and the broader economy.

**While media companies are making obscene profits, they are undercutting the talent that makes their profits possible and inflicting pain onto the broader economy. That’s just wrong.

[Corporate greed has gotten out of control. Sign the petition calling on the CEOs of Netflix, Amazon, Disney, and HBO Max to support the writers’ demands.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63572511/407292039/1045005911?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230519_06%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNmODBjOC00ZWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1woX478v08nU-mdInkh15EuOMh2JbUW2EG5vDi3pwk=&emci=9df61cf9-6ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ebcf80c8-4ef7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63572512/407292040/1045005911?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230519_06%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNmODBjOC00ZWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1woX478v08nU-mdInkh15EuOMh2JbUW2EG5vDi3pwk=&emci=9df61cf9-6ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ebcf80c8-4ef7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63572513/407292041/1045005911?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230519_06%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNmODBjOC00ZWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1woX478v08nU-mdInkh15EuOMh2JbUW2EG5vDi3pwk=&emci=9df61cf9-6ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ebcf80c8-4ef7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
---
Studios and production companies are implementing the corporate pillaging tactics much of the labor force at large has been dealing with. In order to achieve unlimited growth and profits, they look to their labor and talent to bear the painful cuts.

The economics of streaming TV have chipped away at what used to be a route to the middle class. Over the last ten years, TV writers’ pay has decreased 23 percent when adjusted for inflation.What used to be a good paying job has left writers financially struggling.

**TV writers have essentially become a gig economy within the union labor force. Their work makes corporations rich while they are financially struggling.

[Sign on to stand in solidarity with the striking Writers Guild members and tell production studios to agree to their demands! clean_body: Striking writers deserve their fair share! With the advent of streaming services, the business model for the TV industry has changed such that writers are no longer receiving consistent and fair residuals, which make up a substantial part of their income. It has become an existential crisis. The Writers’ Guild of America is on strike to save the livelihood of its writers battling wanton corporate greed. The strike not only puts writers in a tenuous position, it cascades down to others who work in the entertainment industry and the broader economy. While media companies are making obscene profits, they are undercutting the talent that makes their profits possible and inflicting pain onto the broader economy. That’s just wrong. Studios and production companies are implementing the corporate pillaging tactics much of the labor force at large has been dealing with. In order to achieve unlimited growth and profits, they look to their labor and talent to bear the painful cuts. The economics of streaming TV have chipped away at what used to be a route to the middle class. Over the last ten years, TV writers’ pay has decreased 23 percent when adjusted for inflation.What used to be a good paying job has left writers financially struggling. TV writers have essentially become a gig economy within the union labor force. Their work makes corporations rich while they are financially struggling. In Solidarity, Derek Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

name: John Fetterman
subject: Chris Deluzio and I have this in common…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re both in Congress thanks to the same team that showed up and turned out to make history and send us to Washington.
#
Hey Derek,
Congressman Chris Deluzio and I have a lot in common: Yinzers, Iron City Beer enjoyers, and fighters for working people in PA. 💪
That’s why I’m proud to be representing Pennsylvania in Washington alongside Chris, fighting for abortion rights, good jobs, and everything else that matters to folks in every corner of PA.
We’re both in Congress thanks to the same team that showed up and turned out to make history and send us to Washington. And that means the only way we’ll be able to keep up this fight is with your help.
**[If you can today, will you split a contribution between Chris Deluzio and our campaign so we both can keep advocating for PA down in DC?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230520-1?refcode=em20230520-1-8383&amount=5&refcode2=8383_434096_dHz-ru&akid=8383%2E434096%2EdHz-ru)**

Thank you — we’re both glad to have you on our team!
— John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

body:
Fighting illegal immigration, support law enforcement, standing strong for conservative values. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e0dd08ec3e&e=1050d051da)
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. I spent this week working to ensure our brave law enforcement officers have the resources they need to keep us and our communities safe, stopping liberal NGOs from using taxpayer dollars to incentivize illegal immigration, and pushing to make sure conservative policies are included in the debt limit negotiations.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **FIGHTING ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=cdda0001ca&e=1050d051da)
---
| A few months ago, the Red Cross was **CAUGHT** handing out roadmaps to illegal immigrants outlining how to cross the southern border illegally. This is completely unacceptable in my book.

__**Taxpayer dollars should NEVER be used to facilitate illegal immigration.**__

As one of the top GOP investigators in the House, I launched an investigation into the Biden administration. I want to know **EXACTLY** what these organizations are doing with our tax dollars. If they are fueling illegal immigration, they must be held accountable. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c1b4bf6a93&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **SUPPORTING LAW ENFORCEMENT**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e6a95ccaeb&e=1050d051da)
---
| For **YEARS** Democrats waged war on our nation's brave law enforcement officers. AOC, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Talib, and the rest of the extreme Democrat party have called to**DEFUND** and **DISMANTLE** local police departments across the country.

_**This is crazy.**_

Men and women in blue put their lives on the line to protect us and our communities. They deserve to be thanked and honored for their work. This week I voted for legislation to support law enforcement and push back on the far left's anti-police movement.

Over **HALF** of House Democrats voted against our resolution to support America's law enforcement. __It's unacceptable and un-American.__

**I AM, AND ALWAYS WILL BE, PROUD TO BACK THE BLUE.**
---
|
---
| **STANDING STRONG ON THE DEBT CEILING**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=262dd07873&e=1050d051da)
---
| Our nation is just days away from a **BIDEN DEFAULT.** House Republicans are the only people in town who have actually taken action to responsibility avoid default and cut reckless liberal spending in Washington.

**Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Hakeem Jeffries have done NOTHING.**

I joined Speaker McCarthy on the steps of the Capitol this week to stand strong in our demands to Joe Biden. _We want spending cuts. We want to unleash American energy. We want commonsense work requirements. _

I will not back down in my effort to get Washington's fiscal house in order. We can't let Joe Biden, Hakeem Jeffries, and liberal Democrats continue taking us down the path of bigger government and less prosperity. [**[WATCH HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3f4d9d856a&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **DEMOCRATS LIED ABOUT TRUMP-RUSSIA COLLUSION**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8550eab18d&e=1050d051da)
---
| **CONFIRMED:** **The FBI and DOJ had NO EVIDENCE of collusion between President Trump and Russia.**

Republicans have been right all along. This "investigation" was nothing more than a political witch hunt aimed at taking down President Trump.

The FBI should have never launched an investigation in the first place. Government officials at the highest levels allowed this corrupt investigation to continue and the mainstream media pushed the lies for more than **SIX YEARS.**

The continued weaponization of our federal government by Democrats for political gain is disgusting and must be called out. __I am fighting on the Oversight Committee to hold those responsible accountable!__ [**[READ MORE] **](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=74766f35b1&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **SOFT-ON-CRIME POLICIES = RAMPANT CRIME**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1d2607480a&e=1050d051da)
---
| Crime is running rampant in our nation's capital. It's no surprise why. Progressive, soft-on-crime policies put in place by liberal Democrats have allowed criminals to run loose with no regard for the consequences.

Woke prosecutors in Democrat-controlled cities across America refuse to prosecute violent criminals. The results speak for themselves: _Homicides are up 13%, rape is up 23.56%, and aggravated assault is up 33%. _

I held DC leadership's feet to fire this week and demanded answers on why violent criminals are not being held accountable. [**[WATCH HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=979acfdff7&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Stop Democrats from forcing their woke climate agenda into retirement funds
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b6db139171&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")

[**May 20, 1862:** US President Abraham Lincoln signs into law the Homestead Act to provide cheap land for the settlement of the American West (80 million acres by 1900). This law aimed to encourage migration to the Western territories and marked the end of a two-decade-long struggle to distribute public lands to aspiring farmers.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a20bf516ac84f1b94c9a4470c6e257b&_e=4C4y9fPSjGPL9rOfmVz3GEfwLHlXPCFSBJRGs_4AZ78PEFImhQiSC_h5g9nPW_VjtTHFDwbXRJ3WIATwAxF6mkHuiVhGwXYFAshPP10Z0EweOdT1iVWSRP_0kAWCLbOX5vp2e0l-1hrTCl1dZMxJh9O0-jFpDfo4wVTK8NVQ0TAOrzB75HhZSJag0fOrK5MF1t4vcDO8kUp5agoj8FtphVy1TaGNd9r0VVHLBBg1Q0g%3D) **Source - [loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a20bf516ac84f1b94c9a4470c6e257b&_e=4C4y9fPSjGPL9rOfmVz3GEfwLHlXPCFSBJRGs_4AZ78PEFImhQiSC_h5g9nPW_VjtTHFDwbXRJ3WIATwAxF6mtHzM-XJaqo65qqeK-e8GFF30CqjJ6zwAvwsGOWOJqyJn9ohrBvBpiI7ADcL43PnpUsmTExndb3SxZKQhHFYRfEQJpoN2HPfHhTVN1VQS3_fs-Wr-L-X0CD2VZEfjHOboweGjrvplps6XRg9aBPoM5g%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a20bf516ac84f1b94c9a4470c6e257b&_e=4C4y9fPSjGPL9rOfmVz3GF6YrSQOdhpgJeSxdYTqpp2kJLBRFdQZZlc50frAvheA9Oj7Skdy0KVfxVXjckAl4TnKfSBXF-O8lqb7neJq_4bB03KEPPfFe6EHp194RAC1Hd7fhLd_Ur41Wc__nlfi0nOGqSpWbagkebi2HiSZcpor-uBBIgzVErzjpPyAt7SzHANFwkcvV2rMlpxtpwkw7mFTd10ADDarE7jc0f78hUwVHbSxkr0rkfz5uCKLNjaE)**

[**May 20, 1873:** The granting of a patent to Levi Strauss, a businessman from San Francisco, and Jacob Davis, a tailor from Reno, Nevada, was the birth of the renowned clothing item: blue jeans. These innovative work pants were strengthened with metal rivets, and they would go on to become one of the most globally recognized items of clothing.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a20bf516ac84f1b94c9a4470c6e257b&_e=4C4y9fPSjGPL9rOfmVz3GL14ut7zbAqJNVOXy2GIP5wdAcXmN4jI_POtjA93H5JsRQTPyuI47xxnixgLf88JFhl2gSnrEfO4DYJNdF4KeC5CszM9B-qYd2oXodS68q6SwRyiYPfCClzudtLOdXU2E_YbfOvvfPhD-S3KFr4HeZWa1VA1S8xOB0qMbxDTy7BbE2HoxivXcFeafvUKTvMytnOpMqJKszSjjIw7wbJdGmZ47h6LOVsZCJg-7NKv7OXlcSZT99Lcs5ZRGUddsAHjSLH2rAtB7bkEUW8WU0BorIyf3D1D53r3mriTueIHFbcK)

[**May 20, 2015:** David Letterman redefined American talk shows with his unconventional humor and innovative segments. The _Late Show with David Letterman_ is the first iteration of the _Late Show_ franchise. The show debuted on August 30, 1993, and was produced by Letterman's production company, Worldwide Pants Incorporated, and CBS Television Studios.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a20bf516ac84f1b94c9a4470c6e257b&_e=4C4y9fPSjGPL9rOfmVz3GPJzt8qIMaOZF025ZTq05VTctBZKyhfsZeLJaRpjsj0WOQLe7cef6B-sBkjJpPIE62TRCjWzXxNPY7OzztcriKOu_2_t95L_ynGTkRlv7R_scue7l11OLI_zwT1YL-ijXiAwEEI7h6yAZDZlJyG1GgiU5Mf9qqGhV07SugCh56izCpDjkyG_Q0xMgGdt4gMGZR1RArYxQfcXyKQROFrZejmah7AUmcFPmXqflxcQ9ipK) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a20bf516ac84f1b94c9a4470c6e257b&_e=4C4y9fPSjGPL9rOfmVz3GPJzt8qIMaOZF025ZTq05VTctBZKyhfsZeLJaRpjsj0WOQLe7cef6B-sBkjJpPIE62TRCjWzXxNPY7OzztcriKMQvARgYpUbje_YytZrA8dv5FBGViPwM_Xew9hVfh4yqZPhd08_Cl8qo6FjlBFg2AV1jjt2NEzdvr7-9ChhzY2lgpXxCCQI7mrbtYD9k4C76VzaXQ3PHGDQcHsDIdzrjU6IXmu-zih7177x51UTRI2X)**

Team, I don't think the NRA and their lackeys expected me to call out their bullshit so often when I was added to the House Oversight Committee.

But they're getting more than they bargained for — _they're pretty sick of me, and honestly, I love it._ Take a look at this attack campaign they just launched: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63572847/407293131/-349209686?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=JMFC_20230520_EMDF_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGE5N2U3NS01MWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJL7GCQTWPHeV-V0XxLd_rovmXAdEs0FG-fa5hGpC0g=) I'm the guy who is always going to bring up gun violence prevention, because right now, nothing is being done about it. It's outrageous. It's the number one danger to our children and the public health — this is an unarguable FACT.

When I served in the Florida Legislature — under the GOP majority and a Republican Governor — I passed a bill with bi-partisan support after the Parkland massacre that raised the age to purchase a firearm from 18 to 21, and instituted red flag laws, which have been used more than 9,000 times since 2018.

[**The NRA knows I won’t stop until Congress moves on gun violence prevention legislation — that’s why they’re sending their fringe-group lackeys after me. They're scared of the progress that we're making by calling them out. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team Lashrecse
subject: one more month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.17.2023_LA_all&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.17.2023_LA_all&amount=5]
Hi friend,
Today's a big day for our campaign. We're officially one month away from Primary Day, so we wanted to take a minute to remind you of the stakes.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.20.2023_LA_all&amount=10]
This race is about more than simply selecting a primary candidate -- it's about the RIGHT candidate. It's about choosing the kind of leader who will fight tooth and nail for our rights, deliver solutions, and refuse to sell out our district for their own political gain.
In the race for Senate District 13 -- there is only one candidate who fits the bill, and that's Lashrecse. That's why she's earned the endor sements of some of our Commonwealth's top Democratic and progressive groups, including New Majority Virginia, Planned Parenthood Advocates of Virginia, EMILY's List, REPRO Rising Virginia, the Virginia Senate Democratic Women's Caucus , and so many more!
Folks know that when it comes to protecting and defending our Democratic values, Lashrecse will not let us down, and that's more important than ever -- especially when defending reproductive freedoms.
If you've seen the news recently, you may have heard North Carolina just passed an abortion ban through a Republican-led veto override. This means our state will face an influx of out-of-state patients needing abortion care, and we must ensure our Commonwealth is prepared! That means protecting the right to reproductive health care AND making sure it's accessible to anyone in need.
However, our opponent Joe Morrissey has the worst pro-choice record of any sitting Democratic Senator in Virginia, friend. In fact, he regularly brags about it!
We cannot afford another four years of Morrissey with so much on the line -- so we need your support today.
Donate now to help us win on June 20th because our district deserves better! https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
-Team Lashrecse

Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

clean_body: | = | | The Washington Post is reporting on the truth that many of us know, but the GOP won’t admit: their lies have real human consequences. The Big Lie is putting people in danger! = Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible! But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. Some have even received disturbing messages like “I KNOW WHERE YOU SLEEP:” = The Brennan Center for Justice reports that similar intimidation has taken place across the country. And it’s not just at the local level – Secretaries of State have been receiving death threats ever since the 2020 election. With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy -but that takes grassroots support! = | = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

**Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to make a donation today.**

name: Cecile Richards
subject: I'm worried about this, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
Last month, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas tried to overturn the FDA's approval of abortion medication.
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63573829/407296035/-498614040?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2605-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4NDU1ZDViLTVhZjctZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dAWEWFWzvug7a49VfD2h4Eg6bVdcTWWc13zNZ86ZooU=)This terrifies me, friend:

Last month, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas tried to overturn the FDA's approval of abortion medication. Now, after the Supreme Court put a hold on this ruling, it's with the Fifth Circuit Court.

**Let this sink in: This court has the potential to end access to the most common form of abortion in America for millions of people.**
We need laws that will protect health care, not strip it away. name: HER Time
subject: Will you stick with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63574308/407297077/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230520_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU2MDgxZTktNjBmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZXXWSSDYdD1v34WfCat0ZszfiS1JirmDMwK50utNYpA=)
---
We’ve promised to always be honest with you, FirstName/team, so here it is: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip since the election last year. _(Spoiler alert, we’re going to be asking you to chip in at the end of this email. If you want to cut to the chase,_[_**_you can do so right here._**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63574309/407297078/-1193769910?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230520_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU2MDgxZTktNjBmNy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZXXWSSDYdD1v34WfCat0ZszfiS1JirmDMwK50utNYpA=)_)_ The thing is, we saw this coming. It’s the “off year.” Folks check out of politics for a bit. But the fact is, there is no off season for us. We work 24/7, year-round, in order to secure wins for our endorsed candidates and our legislative priorities. We left everything on the field last year, and because of that we were able to re-elect 15 of our 16 frontline Congresswomen. That means we’re starting a bit behind this time around. 2024 is going to be a critical election, and when our supporters check out, it means we have fewer resources to get the job done. That’s why we’re asking you to step up and become a monthly donor today. Knowing we have your $3 or $10 coming in the door every month will help us plan a long term strategy, and get us through the months when fundraising slows down. clean_body: | = We’ve promised to always be honest with you, FirstName/team, so here it is: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip since the election last year. (Spoiler alert, we’re going to be asking you to chip in at the end of this email. If you want to cut to the chase,=) The thing is, we saw this coming. It’s the “off year.” Folks check out of politics for a bit. But the fact is, there is no off season for us. We work 24/7, year-round, in order to secure wins for our endorsed candidates and our legislative priorities. We left everything on the field last year, and because of that we were able to re-elect 15 of our 16 frontline Congresswomen. That means we’re starting a bit behind this time around. 2024 is going to be a critical election, and when our supporters check out, it means we have fewer resources to get the job done. That’s why we’re asking you to step up and become a monthly donor today. Knowing we have your $3 or $10 coming in the door every month will help us plan a long term strategy, and get us through the months when fundraising slows down. Think about it — if you commit to chipping in $3 a month every month until Election Day, that’s just about $50 over the next year and a half. So instead of donating that amount in October 2024, commit to making an early and consistent investment in our year round work. subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
Can we beat Democrats at their own game? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-aljekl-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* Where is the **[missing whistleblower](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-y/)**?
* Colorado college wants you to **[assume everyone is trans](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-j/)**.
* The **[Durham Report](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-t/) **has been released. You can **[read it here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-i/)**.
* The **[US has given way more aid](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-d/)** to Ukraine than other countries.
* A **[new term for WHITE](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-h/)** can be a mouthful.
* IRS has **[removed the entire team](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-k/)** investigating Hunter Biden.
* Biden is going to **[ban chocolate milk](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-u/) **in schools.
* These Democrats are wearing a **[badge of shame](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-o/).**
* Biden has HOW MANY**[bank accounts](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-x/)?**
* Senator**[Feinstein has no idea](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-m/) **what's going on.
* **[Articles of impeachment](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-c/) **have been filed.
* We need to **[clean house](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-q/)** at the FBI.
* Will Adam **[Schiff be expelled](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-a/)** from Congress?

### **Obama Knew**
Obama and Director of national intelligence, James Clapper**,[were both briefed in 2016 on reports that then-presidential candidate Hillary Clinton planned to vilify Donald Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-f/) **by claiming he was colluding with Russia to win the election
### **Can We Beat Democrats at Their Own Game?**
**[We understand the impulse among some Republicans to throw up their hands in frustration when it comes to ballot harvesting](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-z/).** They advocate rapidly deploying their own ballot-harvesting operations in advance of the 2024 election. **Scott for President 2024** Sen. Tim Scott of South Carolina, a rising star in the GOP**,[is jumping into the race for the 2024 Republican presidential nomination.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-v/) **Join his CaucusRoom Group **[here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-e/).** [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-yd/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljekl-trhiujldw-yk/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: Matt Strickland
subject: No, You Move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Strickland
body:
After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17.
After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17. | | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckE1vnDAQhn_NcAPBGNubA4cmiFSqVFWVKqWnaPBH1hWDiTFL999XoLaHXObwzKN3PoiXKfh7B_oREK_BroAI4hMgvv_cOW2_-MtzKZdv5bv6yvJo4hMg5vvi_pt_QyrHFKaD6r6wHSnyzhaua9SlVSiVboprJ1COstFKG2ofpNRYO-lG65Euo784X4QOaxS1PKposa2UQzk-CPRyFKMlgrY-B1XU7JRSjFyZyMXUXXNe1nOjAXBYndmSq2h2NubDAByYcvYx3QhwmGN5j1vJ8eZKLHksI4MYtsyva9yScSD6PQGqg7CzYWMQ_ZFyEkO8UHibQfQ8AiriuM0ZRI_ynxHn7E40m6n0n037-PzDUA-oXucpWBD9B3h-X_Ravzx933-_FKmzyx6mKaxKQ1u_nUebyH8CAAD__1BAiFE)
Friend,

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckMtunTAQhp9m2IE4Y2zDgkUaly4qVVGlSukq8o3gisHEmNDz9hWo7SKbWXzz6Z-LpnUO470H-QkQp-A2QAT2AIhvPw9K-y_6-qXk61P5Jr4RP5v4CIj5vvr_5t-QypMO80mlKlyvhR69K3x_E20jkAt5K6betnUnjRW1s1aLruMdazvP_SiNM07aIvRYI6v5WVmDTSU8ctMxHLlhxmkNTX0NqvTt0CnFSJWNVMz9lPO6XRsNgMPm7Z58pRfvYj4NwIF0zmNM7xpwWGJ5j3tJ8d2XWJIpIwEb9kwvW9yT9cDUkQDFSci7sBMwdaZcxGpadXhdgCkygEJT3JcMTCH_Z8Ql-wstdi79ptof08NT-xlQvCxzcMDUB3h9nykpnx-_H7-fi9S79QjzHDYhoalfr6NtpD8BAAD__9ysiKs) You’ve probably never heard of me, and if it wasn’t for the Army, I probably wouldn’t be alive today to even write you.

My name is Matt Strickland, and I’m running for Senate in Virginia.
Early voting has already started for my primary, and I could really **[use your help in this last stretch](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckL-OnDAQh59m6IzYMbZ3C4rLIVJEiqIrokt1Gmyz6xWDOWOObJ4-AiUp0kzxzaff_CGexzA8GjCfAPEW3AKIIJ8A8f3Hxmm985fPQs3fxLv-ympv4jMg5sfs_5l_QkrPFMadmrZwDWkavCt8c9LnWqPS5lTcmr6mikhVg7uczaAMXfRZSXsyxl4s-aEIDVYoK7VXWWNdao-qv0gcVC97RwR1dQwq6bRRSjFyaSMXY3PLeV6OjTrAbvF2Tb6kybuYdwOwY8p5iOmDALspikdcBccPL1BwLyKD7NbMb0tck_Ug2y0B6p2wd2FlkO2echBLPFO4TiBb7gE1cVynDLJF9deIU_YHmuwonl7u_a_r_fb9DKjfpjE4kO1_8Pi-bI15fX7Zfr4WqXHzFsYxLNpAXV2Po23k3wEAAP__0VOJbw)**.

After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17.

I reported to my first duty station on September 10, 2001. The next day the Towers fell, and I spent the next decade fighting in Iraq and Afghanistan. I went from dodging gangs to fighting terrorists . . . and **it feels like I’ve never stopped fighting**.

Let me tell you why . . .

After working for Blackwater and working several deployments as a combat medic, I came home and just wanted some peace with my family.

I bought a food truck and started doing what I loved. It was a hit, and me and my wife, Maria, expanded to a restaurant that we named Gourmeltz.

Life was good for a stretch, then the pandemic hit, and the government illegally ordered me to close my restaurant.

Now listen, I spent too much time fighting for our country to come home and be told that I couldn’t provide for my family . . . that I had to shut the doors to my business and lay off the staff I worked so hard to hire and train.

Maria and I prayed about it. We talked to our staff, and then I talked to my kids.

We have three boys and a beautiful girl.

One of my boys is into comic books, and when I was in his room, I picked up one of them and there was Captain America with this quote . . .

| | ❝ | “Doesn’t matter what the press says.
Doesn’t matter what the Politicians or the mobs say.
Doesn’t matter if the whole country decides that something is wrong is something right.

This nation was founded on one principle above all else:
The requirement that we stand up for what we believe,
no matter the odds or consequences.
When the mob and the press and the whole world tell you to move, your job is to plant yourself like a tree beside the river of truth, and tell the whole world –

‘**No, YOU move**.’”

---|---

And that’s what I did.

The day after an order to shut down was posted on my door, I went to work that morning, opened up, and let the customers in.

The government revoked my permits, my liquor license and even raided the restaurant with armed agents . . . **and I stood my ground and NEVER closed**.

I took the government to court and finally won after nearly losing everything.

And that experience opened my eyes to our government and politicians, and that’s why **[I’m running today and asking for your support](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckL-OnDAQh59m6EAwg81eQZFbRIpIUZJqU50GbG4dMZgz9nH79hEoSZFmim9--uYPyzq76dFC8wyId2c2QAT6BIhvP3cJ6Zd8-Zyr9Vv-pr-KOpp4BcT4WO2_5B9JYYXdfNCmy0zLmidrMttW-lJrVLqpsnurtZloHC5cUlmXOFFpnpoLT6qpcDCkMtdiiVSqo1KNdaEtquGJcFIDDYYZ6vIcVHC1cwjeSzF6yeb2HuO6nRv1gP1mxxRswYs1Ph4JwF44xsmHdwbsF58_fMrFv9sccxlyL0B9ivKy-RRGC9TtAVAfRKxxSYC6w3KSkWVl97oAdTIAahaflgjUofqb8Eu0J1rGOQ_Xj-fvnG7bIXhZZmeAuv_g-X3qmuZ2_bF_3LLQmnV38-w23UBdvp5Hj15-BwAA__8ik4kl).**

Now, I’m running as a Republican but I’m not proud of a few of the spineless, establishment hacks I’ll be serving with when I win.

These are the same folks that I contacted for help when I had a government boot on my neck . . . and **they’re the same folks who ignored me UNTIL I won**.

And yeah, after I finally won, they all showed up. One even offered to fly a flag over the state Capitol in my honor. I told him, “No thanks.”

**I’m running to CRUSH THE ESTABLISHMENT** . . . Republican or Democrat, I don’t care. If they do nothing when the freedoms of Americans are taken away, they’re all the same to me.

I’m running for Senate in Virginia to give a voice and two fists to all of the people just like us . . . who are powerless to the politicians and their government.

We won’t be powerless anymore . . . **[but I’ll need you to back me for that to happen](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckE1vnDAQhn_NcAPBGOzsgUMTRKVWqqpempyi8QdZVwxmjR26_74CtT3k4sPzPno9M8Tr7Kd7D-oREK_eboAI4hMg3l52jvkXf_1cduv38ia_cXeE-ASI6b66_-bfksox-fmgaihsT5ImZwvXN_KhldhJ1RTXHtuLVuIByTQ0Ud0427SiVs3FoDGm04XvsUZRd8crWmwr6bDTF4FTp4W2RNDW50cVNTvFGAJXJnAx99eU1u2caAQcN2dydBUtzoZ0GIAjU0pTiO8EOC6hvIdccnh3JZasy8Agxpz4dQs5Ggdi2COgPAg76zODGI6WkxjilfzbAmJgDSiJQ14SiAG7f0ZYkjvRYubyp8ybfnn8cjvi12X2FsTwAZ7XF4NSz08_9t_PReztuvt59ptU0NZv59Im8J8AAAD__0uViJ4)**.

You in?

My primary is coming up in just a few days, and **none of the clowns in power want me to win** because they know I’ll be the guy who stands in their way, looks them dead in the eye and tells them, “**No, YOU move**.”

**[Help me get to it.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckL2OnTAQRp9m6IxgjM29BcVmESmiRFHSbKrVYJvFEYPBmCX37SNQkiLNFGeOvvkhXiY_PBqoPwDi6O0GiCCfAHH9cXDcf_Knj0ItX8Wqv7A6m_gMiOmxuH_mn5DcMfnppHWb2YY0Dc5mrin1rdKodF1mY6OkGgiNqfv-NhR3M5jCurIs70S2vFOR-QYLlIU6q6ywyrVD1d8lDqqXvSWCqrgG5VQeFGMInJvA2dSMKS3btVEH2G3O7NHlNDsb0mkAdkwpDSG-E2A3B_EIu-Dw7gQK7kVgkN2e-HULezQOZHtEQH0SdtbvDLI9Uy5iiBfybzPIlntATRz2OYFsUf01wpzchWYziSf8bm7j57VbAfXrPHkLsv0PXt-XbV2_PH87fr1ksbHL4afJb7qGqni7jjaBfwcAAP__8KaI7A)**

Respectfully,

Matt Strickland
Candidate
Virginia Senate

clean_body: After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17. After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17. | | | | Friend, You’ve probably never heard of me, and if it wasn’t for the Army, I probably wouldn’t be alive today to even write you. My name is Matt Strickland, and I’m running for Senate in Virginia. Early voting has already started for my primary, and I could really . After my older brother was gunned down and killed, I escaped street violence by enlisting in the Army when I was 17. I reported to my first duty station on September 10, 2001. The next day the Towers fell, and I spent the next decade fighting in Iraq and Afghanistan. I went from dodging gangs to fighting terrorists . . . and it feels like I’ve never stopped fighting. Let me tell you why . . . After working for Blackwater and working several deployments as a combat medic, I came home and just wanted some peace with my family. I bought a food truck and started doing what I loved. It was a hit, and me and my wife, Maria, expanded to a restaurant that we named Gourmeltz. Life was good for a stretch, then the pandemic hit, and the government illegally ordered me to close my restaurant. Now listen, I spent too much time fighting for our country to come home and be told that I couldn’t provide for my family . . . that I had to shut the doors to my business and lay off the staff I worked so hard to hire and train. Maria and I prayed about it. We talked to our staff, and then I talked to my kids. We have three boys and a beautiful girl. One of my boys is into comic books, and when I was in his room, I picked up one of them and there was Captain America with this quote . . . | | ❝ | “Doesn’t matter what the press says. Doesn’t matter what the Politicians or the mobs say. Doesn’t matter if the whole country decides that something is wrong is something right. This nation was founded on one principle above all else: The requirement that we stand up for what we believe, no matter the odds or consequences. When the mob and the press and the whole world tell you to move, your job is to plant yourself like a tree beside the river of truth, and tell the whole world – ‘No, YOU move.’” ---|--- And that’s what I did. The day after an order to shut down was posted on my door, I went to work that morning, opened up, and let the customers in. The government revoked my permits, my liquor license and even raided the restaurant with armed agents . . . and I stood my ground and NEVER closed. I took the government to court and finally won after nearly losing everything. And that experience opened my eyes to our government and politicians, and that’s why . Now, I’m running as a Republican but I’m not proud of a few of the spineless, establishment hacks I’ll be serving with when I win. These are the same folks that I contacted for help when I had a government boot on my neck . . . and they’re the same folks who ignored me UNTIL I won. And yeah, after I finally won, they all showed up. One even offered to fly a flag over the state Capitol in my honor. I told him, “No thanks.” I’m running to CRUSH THE ESTABLISHMENT . . . Republican or Democrat, I don’t care. If they do nothing when the freedoms of Americans are taken away, they’re all the same to me. I’m running for Senate in Virginia to give a voice and two fists to all of the people just like us . . . who are powerless to the politicians and their government. We won’t be powerless anymore . . . . You in? My primary is coming up in just a few days, and none of the clowns in power want me to win because they know I’ll be the guy who stands in their way, looks them dead in the eye and tells them, “No, YOU move.” Respectfully, Matt Strickland Candidate Virginia Senate P.S. Now that you’ve read some of my story, you get why they’re all gunning for me. I will never work for them, I work for us. They know it and they’re throwing tons of money behind my competitor to stop me. But I got you. Paid for by Friends of Matt Strickland
